title: Can an LLM Detect Instances of Microservice Infrastructure Patterns?
authors: Carlos Eduardo Duarte, Neil B. Harrison, Filipe Figueiredo Correia, Ademar Aguiar, Pavlína Gonçalves
abstract: Architectural patterns are frequently found in various software artifacts. The wide variety of patterns and their implementations makes detection challenging with current tools, especially since they often only support detecting patterns in artifacts written in a single language. Large Language Models (LLMs), trained on a diverse range of software artifacts and knowledge, might overcome the limitations of existing approaches. However, their true effectiveness and the factors influencing their performance have not yet been thoroughly examined. To better understand this, we developed MicroPAD. This tool utilizes GPT 5 nano to identify architectural patterns in software artifacts written in any language, based on natural-language pattern descriptions. We used MicroPAD to evaluate an LLM's ability to detect instances of architectural patterns, particularly infrastructure-related microservice patterns. To accomplish this, we selected a set of GitHub repositories and contacted their top contributors to create a new, human-annotated dataset of 190 repositories containing microservice architectural patterns. The results show that MicroPAD was capable of detecting pattern instances across multiple languages and artifact types. The detection performance varied across patterns (F1 scores ranging from 0.09 to 0.70), specifically in relation to their prevalence and the distinctiveness of the artifacts through which they manifest. We also found that patterns associated with recognizable, dominant artifacts were detected more reliably. Whether these findings generalize to other LLMs and tools is a promising direction for future research.
title_zh: 大型语言模型能否识别微服务基础设施模式的实例？
abstract_zh: 架构模式在各种软件制品中频繁出现。由于模式种类繁多且实现方式各异，当前工具在检测这些模式时面临挑战，尤其是因为它们通常仅支持在单一编程语言编写的代码中识别模式。大型语言模型（LLMs）经过大量多样化的软件制品和知识训练，可能能够克服现有方法的局限性。然而，其实际有效性以及影响性能的关键因素尚未得到充分研究。为了更深入地理解这一问题，我们开发了 MicroPAD。该工具利用 GPT-5 nano 模型，基于自然语言描述的模式定义，能够识别用任意语言编写的软件制品中的架构模式。我们使用 MicroPAD 评估了大型语言模型在检测架构模式实例方面的能力，特别是与基础设施相关的微服务模式。为此，我们选取了一组 GitHub 仓库，并联系其主要贡献者，构建了一个新的、由人工标注的数据集，包含 190 个包含微服务架构模式的仓库。实验结果表明，MicroPAD 能够跨多种编程语言和不同类型的软件制品有效检测模式实例。不同模式的检测性能存在差异（F1 分数介于 0.09 到 0.70 之间），这与模式的普遍程度及其在具体制品中表现的独特性密切相关。我们还发现，那些与可识别、主导性的软件制品相关联的模式更容易被准确检测。这些发现是否适用于其他大型语言模型和工具，将是未来研究的一个有前景的方向。

title: DBAutoDoc: Automated Discovery and Documentation of Undocumented Database Schemas via Statistical Analysis and Iterative LLM Refinement
authors: Amith Nagarajan, Thomas Altman
abstract: A tremendous number of critical database systems lack adequate documentation. Declared primary keys are absent, foreign key constraints have been dropped for performance, column names are cryptic abbreviations, and no entity-relationship diagrams exist. We present DBAutoDoc, a system that automates the discovery and documentation of undocumented relational database schemas by combining statistical data analysis with iterative large language model (LLM) refinement. DBAutoDoc's central insight is that schema understanding is fundamentally an iterative, graph-structured problem. Drawing structural inspiration from backpropagation in neural networks, DBAutoDoc propagates semantic corrections through schema dependency graphs across multiple refinement iterations until descriptions converge. This propagation is discrete and semantic rather than mathematical, but the structural analogy is precise: early iterations produce rough descriptions akin to random initialization, and successive passes sharpen the global picture as context flows through the graph. The system makes four concrete contributions detailed in the paper. On a suite of benchmark databases, DBAutoDoc achieved overall weighted scores of 96.1% across two model families (Google's Gemini and Anthropic's Claude) using a composite metric. Ablation analysis demonstrates that the deterministic pipeline contributes a 23-point F1 improvement over LLM-only FK detection, confirming that the system's contribution is substantial and independent of LLM pre-training knowledge. DBAutoDoc is released as open-source software with all evaluation configurations and prompt templates included for full reproducibility.
title_zh: DBAutoDoc：通过统计分析与迭代式大语言模型优化实现未文档化数据库模式的自动发现与文档生成
abstract_zh: 大量关键数据库系统缺乏充分的文档支持。主键声明缺失，为提升性能而删除了外键约束，列名使用晦涩难懂的缩写，且不存在实体-关系图。我们提出了DBAutoDoc系统，该系统通过结合统计数据分析与迭代式大语言模型（LLM）优化，实现了对未文档化关系型数据库模式的自动化发现与文档生成。DBAutoDoc的核心洞察在于：模式理解本质上是一个迭代式的、图结构的问题。受神经网络反向传播机制的结构启发，DBAutoDoc在多个迭代过程中，沿着模式依赖图传播语义修正，直至描述趋于收敛。这种传播是离散且语义导向的，而非数学计算，但其结构类比极为精确：早期迭代产生的描述类似于随机初始化，随着上下文在图中不断流动，后续迭代逐步完善全局认知。本研究在论文中具体贡献了四项创新。在一组基准数据库上，DBAutoDoc在两个模型系列（Google的Gemini和Anthropic的Claude）中均取得了96.1%的综合加权得分。消融分析表明，确定性处理流程相较于仅依赖LLM的外键检测方法，F1分数提升了23个百分点，证实了该系统贡献显著且独立于LLM的预训练知识。DBAutoDoc已作为开源软件发布，所有评估配置与提示模板均已公开，确保结果可完全复现。

title: Set-Valued Prediction for Large Language Models with Feasibility-Aware Coverage Guarantees
authors: Ye Li, Anqi Hu, Yuanchang Ye, Shiyan Tong, Zhiyuan Wang, Bo Fu
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) inherently operate over a large generation space, yet conventional usage typically reports the most likely generation (MLG) as a point prediction, which underestimates the model's capability: although the top-ranked response can be incorrect, valid answers may still exist within the broader output space and can potentially be discovered through repeated sampling. This observation motivates moving from point prediction to set-valued prediction, where the model produces a set of candidate responses rather than a single MLG. In this paper, we propose a principled framework for set-valued prediction, which provides feasibility-aware coverage guarantees. We show that, given the finite-sampling nature of LLM generation, coverage is not always achievable: even with multiple samplings, LLMs may fail to yield an acceptable response for certain questions within the sampled candidate set. To address this, we establish a minimum achievable risk level (MRL), below which statistical coverage guarantees cannot be satisfied. Building on this insight, we then develop a data-driven calibration procedure that constructs prediction sets from sampled responses by estimating a rigorous threshold, ensuring that the resulting set contains a correct answer with a desired probability whenever the target risk level is feasible. Extensive experiments on six language generation tasks with five LLMs demonstrate both the statistical validity and the predictive efficiency of our framework.
title_zh: 具有可行性感知覆盖保证的大语言模型集合预测
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）本质上在广阔的生成空间中运行，但传统使用方式通常仅报告最可能的生成结果（MLG）作为点预测，这低估了模型的实际能力：尽管排名最高的响应可能是错误的，但在更广泛的输出空间中仍可能存在有效答案，通过多次采样有可能被发现。这一观察促使我们从点预测转向集合值预测，即模型生成一组候选回答，而非单一的MLG。本文提出了一种原则性的集合值预测框架，该框架能够提供考虑可行性保障的覆盖性承诺。我们证明，在LLM生成具有有限采样特性的前提下，覆盖性并非总能实现：即使进行多次采样，某些问题在所采样的候选集内仍可能无法获得可接受的回答。为应对这一挑战，我们确立了一个最低可实现风险水平（MRL），低于该水平时，统计覆盖性保证将无法满足。基于此洞察，我们进一步开发了一种数据驱动的校准方法，通过估计一个严格的阈值，从采样得到的响应中构建预测集合，确保当目标风险水平可行时，所生成的集合以期望概率包含正确答案。在五个大型语言模型上针对六项语言生成任务的大量实验表明，本框架兼具统计有效性与预测高效性。

title: SoK: The Attack Surface of Agentic AI -- Tools, and Autonomy
authors: Ali Dehghantanha, Sajad Homayoun
abstract: Recent AI systems combine large language models with tools, external knowledge via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and even autonomous multi-agent decision loops. This agentic AI paradigm greatly expands capabilities - but also vastly enlarges the attack surface. In this systematization, we map out the trust boundaries and security risks of agentic LLM-based systems. We develop a comprehensive taxonomy of attacks spanning prompt-level injections, knowledge-base poisoning, tool/plug-in exploits, and multi-agent emergent threats. Through a detailed literature review, we synthesize evidence from 2023-2025, including more than 20 peer-reviewed and archival studies, industry reports, and standards. We find that agentic systems introduce new vectors for indirect prompt injection, code execution exploits, RAG index poisoning, and cross-agent manipulation that go beyond traditional AI threats. We define attacker models and threat scenarios, and propose metrics (e.g., Unsafe Action Rate, Privilege Escalation Distance) to evaluate security posture. Our survey examines defenses such as input sanitization, retrieval filters, sandboxes, access control, and "AI guardrails," assessing their effectiveness and pointing out the areas where protection is still lacking. To assist practitioners, we outline defensive controls and provide a phased security checklist for deploying agentic AI (covering design-time hardening, runtime monitoring, and incident response). Finally, we outline open research challenges in secure autonomous AI (robust tool APIs, verifiable agent behavior, supply-chain safeguards) and discuss ethical and responsible disclosure practices. We systematize recent findings to help researchers and engineers understand and mitigate security risks in agentic AI.
title_zh: SoK：代理型人工智能的攻击面——工具与自主性
abstract_zh: 近期的人工智能系统将大型语言模型与工具、通过检索增强生成（RAG）获取的外部知识，甚至自主的多智能体决策循环相结合。这种代理式人工智能（agentic AI）范式极大地扩展了系统能力，但也显著扩大了攻击面。在本系统化研究中，我们梳理了基于代理式大模型系统的信任边界与安全风险，构建了一个涵盖提示注入、知识库污染、工具/插件滥用以及多智能体涌现威胁的全面攻击分类体系。通过对2023至2025年间超过20项同行评审论文、档案研究、行业报告及标准规范的深入文献综述，我们发现，代理式系统引入了新的间接提示注入、代码执行漏洞、RAG索引污染以及跨智能体操纵等攻击向量，远超传统AI安全威胁范畴。我们定义了攻击者模型与威胁场景，并提出一系列评估指标（如“不安全动作率”、“权限提升距离”），用于衡量系统的安全态势。我们的综述还分析了多种防御措施的有效性，包括输入净化、检索过滤、沙箱机制、访问控制以及“AI护栏”等，指出了当前防护仍存在薄弱环节。为帮助实践者，我们提出了具体的防御控制策略，并提供了一个分阶段的安全检查清单，覆盖设计阶段强化、运行时监控和事件响应等关键环节。最后，我们总结了安全自主AI领域的开放性研究挑战（如鲁棒的工具API、可验证的智能体行为、供应链安全保障），并探讨了伦理责任披露的最佳实践。本研究系统化地整合了最新研究成果，旨在帮助研究人员与工程师深入理解并有效缓解代理式AI中的安全风险。

title: KALAVAI: Predicting When Independent Specialist Fusion Works -- A Quantitative Model for Post-Hoc Cooperative LLM Training
authors: Ramchand Kumaresan
abstract: Independently trained domain specialists can be fused post-hoc into a single model that outperforms any individual specialist, and the gain is predictable: gain = 0.82 x divergence - 2.72 (R^2 = 0.856, n=6, 3-26% divergence). This enables practitioners to estimate cooperative value before committing compute. Below ~3.3% divergence, gains approach zero.In the KALAVAI protocol, contributors fine-tune copies of a shared checkpoint independently, then submit for lightweight MoE routing (500 steps). Gains are consistent: +7.72% at 410M (+/-0.02%, 3 seeds), +7.49% at 1B (+/-0.01%, 3 seeds), +6.53% at 6.9B, each over the best specialist. The router matches domain-oracle routing within <10^{-5} nats. Cross-lingual fusion (Tamil/Yoruba/Welsh/Code) achieves +21.76%, with Yoruba perplexity falling 41.9 to 7.7. A 20-contributor federation achieves +16.71% (+/-0.07pp, 3 seeds).Three requirements bound the protocol. Shared initialisation is necessary: checkpoint mismatch degrades routing. Frozen layers are optional below ~10,000 steps and beneficial beyond. Learned routing is essential: uniform averaging degrades by -1.2% vs. best specialist, while any trained router achieves oracle-optimal assignment.
title_zh: 卡拉瓦伊：预测独立专家融合何时有效——一种用于事后协作式大语言模型训练的量化模型
abstract_zh:
独立训练的领域专家模型可在事后融合为单一模型，其性能超越任一单独专家，且增益具有可预测性：增益 = 0.82 × 分歧度 - 2.72（R² = 0.856，n=6，分歧度范围3%-26%）。这一特性使从业者在投入计算资源前即可预估协作价值。当分歧度低于约3.3%时，增益趋近于零。

在KALAVAI协议中，参与者独立微调共享检查点的副本，随后提交进行轻量级MoE路由（仅500步）。增益稳定：在410M规模下提升+7.72%（±0.02%，3个种子），1B规模下提升+7.49%（±0.01%，3个种子），6.9B规模下提升+6.53%，均优于最优专家。路由器的性能与领域“预言家”路由相比差异小于10⁻⁵纳特。

跨语言融合（泰米尔语/约鲁巴语/威尔士语/代码）实现+21.76%的增益，其中约鲁巴语困惑度从41.9降至7.7。一个由20名贡献者组成的联邦系统实现+16.71%的增益（±0.07个百分点，3个种子）。

该协议受三个条件约束：共享初始化是必需的——检查点不一致会降低路由效果；冻结层在低于约10,000步时可选，超过则有益；学习型路由至关重要：均匀平均法相比最优专家下降-1.2%，而任何经过训练的路由器均可实现接近“预言家”最优的分配。

title: Why Database Manuals Are Not Enough: Efficient and Reliable Configuration Tuning for DBMSs via Code-Driven LLM Agents
authors: Xinyi Zhang, Tiantian Chen, Zhentao Han, Zhaoyan Hong, Wei Lu, Sheng Wang, Mo Sha, Anni Wang, Shuang Liu, Yakun Zhang, Feifei Li, Xiaoyong Du
abstract: Modern database management systems (DBMSs) expose hundreds of configuration knobs that critically influence performance. Existing automated tuning methods either adopt a data-driven paradigm, which incurs substantial overhead, or rely on manual-driven heuristics extracted from database documentation, which are often limited and overly generic. Motivated by the fact that the control logic of configuration knobs is inherently encoded in the DBMS source code, we argue that promising tuning strategies can be mined directly from the code, uncovering fine-grained insights grounded in system internals. To this end, we propose SysInsight, a code-driven database tuning system that automatically extracts fine-grained tuning knowledge from DBMS source code to accelerate and stabilize the tuning process. SysInsight combines static code analysis with LLM-based reasoning to identify knob-controlled execution paths and extract semantic tuning insights. These insights are then transformed into quantitative and verifiable tuning rules via association rule mining grounded in tuning observations. During online tuning, system diagnosis is applied to identify critical knobs, which are adjusted under the rule guidance. Evaluations demonstrate that compared to the SOTA baseline, SysInsight converges to the best configuration on average 7.11X faster while achieving a 19.9% performance improvement.
title_zh: 为什么数据库手册不足以应对：通过代码驱动的大型语言模型代理实现DBMS的高效可靠配置调优
abstract_zh: 现代数据库管理系统（DBMS）提供了数百个配置参数，这些参数对系统性能具有关键影响。现有的自动化调优方法要么采用数据驱动范式，带来显著的开销；要么依赖从数据库文档中提取的手动启发式规则，但这些规则往往受限且过于泛化。鉴于配置参数的控制逻辑本质上编码在DBMS源代码之中，我们提出：通过直接从源代码中挖掘潜在的调优策略，可以揭示基于系统内部机制的细粒度洞察。为此，我们提出了SysInsight——一种基于代码的数据库调优系统，能够自动从DBMS源代码中提取细粒度的调优知识，从而加速并稳定整个调优过程。SysInsight结合静态代码分析与基于大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，识别受参数控制的执行路径，并提取语义层面的调优洞见。这些洞见随后通过基于调优观测结果的关联规则挖掘，转化为可量化、可验证的调优规则。在线调优过程中，系统诊断用于识别关键参数，并在规则指导下进行调整。评估结果表明，相较于当前最先进基线方法，SysInsight平均提速7.11倍达到最优配置，同时性能提升达19.9%。

title: Code Review Agent Benchmark
authors: Yuntong Zhang, Zhiyuan Pan, Imam Nur Bani Yusuf, Haifeng Ruan, Ridwan Shariffdeen, Abhik Roychoudhury
abstract: Software engineering agents have shown significant promise in writing code. As AI agents permeate code writing, and generate huge volumes of code automatically -- the matter of code quality comes front and centre. As the automatically generated code gets integrated into huge code-bases -- the issue of code review and broadly quality assurance becomes important. In this paper, we take a fresh look at the problem and curate a code review dataset for AI agents to work with. Our dataset called c-CRAB (pronounced see-crab) can evaluate agents for code review tasks. Specifically given a pull-request (which could be coming from code generation agents or humans), if a code review agent produces a review, our evaluation framework can asses the reviewing capability of the code review agents. Our evaluation framework is used to evaluate the state of the art today -- the open-source PR-agent, as well as commercial code review agents from Devin, Claude Code, and Codex. Our c-CRAB dataset is systematically constructed from human reviews -- given a human review of a pull request instance we generate corresponding tests to evaluate the code review agent generated reviews. Such a benchmark construction gives us several insights. Firstly, the existing review agents taken together can solve only around 40% of the c-CRAB tasks, indicating the potential to close this gap by future research. Secondly, we observe that the agent reviews often consider different aspects from the human reviews -- indicating the potential for human-agent collaboration for code review that could be deployed in future software teams. Last but not the least, the agent generated tests from our data-set act as a held out test-suite and hence quality gate for agent generated reviews. What this will mean for future collaboration of code generation agents, test generation agents and code review agents -- remains to be investigated.
title_zh: 代码审查代理基准
abstract_zh:
软件工程代理在编写代码方面已展现出巨大潜力。随着AI代理深入参与代码生成，自动生成大量代码已成为常态——代码质量问题因此变得尤为突出。当这些自动生成的代码被集成到庞大的代码库中时，代码审查及整体质量保障的重要性愈发凸显。本文从全新视角审视这一问题，并构建了一个专为AI代理设计的代码审查数据集。我们称之为c-CRAB（发音为“see-crab”），该数据集可用于评估代理在代码审查任务中的表现。具体而言，针对一个拉取请求（无论是由代码生成代理还是人类提交），若代码审查代理能够生成相应的审查意见，我们的评估框架便可对其审查能力进行评测。

该评估框架被用于检验当前最先进的技术：开源的PR-Agent，以及来自Devin、Claude Code和Codex的商业代码审查代理。c-CRAB数据集是基于真实的人类审查记录系统性构建的——对于每一个拉取请求实例的人类审查意见，我们生成相应的测试用例，以评估由代码审查代理生成的审查结果。这种基准构建方式带来了若干重要洞见：

首先，现有审查代理综合来看仅能完成约40%的c-CRAB任务，表明未来研究仍有巨大提升空间，可有效缩小这一差距。  
其次，我们发现代理生成的审查意见往往关注与人类不同的方面，这提示了未来人机协作在代码审查中的潜力，有望在实际软件团队中实现高效协同。  
最后但同样重要的是，由我们数据集中生成的代理测试用例可作为独立的测试套件，充当对代理生成审查意见的质量门槛。  
至于未来代码生成代理、测试生成代理与代码审查代理之间如何协同工作，仍需进一步探索与研究。

title: Let Functions Speak: Lightweight Parametric Polymorphism via Domain and Range Types
authors: Siyuan He, Songlin Jia, Tiark Rompf
abstract: Dynamic languages such as Python and JavaScript widely use function decorators to extend behavior. In TypeScript, a common way to type such patterns uses Parameters<T> and ReturnType<T>. In practice, this idiom relies on a function-type bound for T that is expressed using the unsafe type any, which weakens static guarantees. At the core is a standard typing principle: application is justified only when the callee is exposed as an arrow type. We present F<:DR, a calculus that adds domain and range projection types, Dom(T) and Range(T), for arbitrary types T. These projections permit typing applications through abstract function types: an argument of type Dom(T) witnesses callability, and the result is typed as Range(T). This design complements, rather than replaces, standard arrow-based application, which remains admissible via subtyping in System F<:. We mechanize F<:DR in Rocq and prove semantic type soundness using logical relations with path selection, which delays projection interpretation until function structure is resolved. The same technique extends to additional projection types, illustrated for primitive pairs, i.e., product types.
title_zh: 让函数发声：通过域与值域类型实现轻量级参数多态
abstract_zh: 动态语言如 Python 和 JavaScript 广泛使用函数装饰器来扩展行为。在 TypeScript 中，一种常见的类型化模式是使用 `Parameters<T>` 和 `ReturnType<T>`。然而，在实践中，这种惯用法依赖于对类型 T 的函数类型绑定，而该绑定通常通过不安全的 `any` 类型表达，从而削弱了静态类型保证。其核心问题在于一个基本的类型规则：只有当被调用方以箭头类型（arrow type）暴露时，函数调用才是合理的。我们提出 F<:DR，这是一个扩展的类型演算，引入了针对任意类型 T 的域投影类型（domain projection type）`Dom(T)` 和值域投影类型（range projection type）`Range(T)`。这些投影类型允许通过抽象函数类型进行类型化调用：一个类型为 `Dom(T)` 的参数证明了可调用性，而返回值则被类型化为 `Range(T)`。这一设计并非取代传统的箭头类型应用，而是对其补充；标准的箭头类型调用依然可以通过 System F<: 中的子类型关系保持可接受性。我们在 Rocq 中对 F<:DR 进行了机械化，并使用带有路径选择的逻辑关系方法证明了语义类型安全性，该方法将投影解释延迟到函数结构被明确解析之后才进行。同样的技术还可推广至其他投影类型，本文以原生对偶（即乘积类型）为例进行了说明。

title: On the Vulnerability of FHE Computation to Silent Data Corruption
authors: Jianan Mu, Ge Yu, Zhaoxuan Kan, Song Bian, Liang Kong, Zizhen Liu, Cheng Liu, Jing Ye, Huawei Li
abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is rapidly emerging as a promising foundation for privacy-preserving cloud services, enabling computation directly on encrypted data. As FHE implementations mature and begin moving toward practical deployment in domains such as secure finance, biomedical analytics, and privacy-preserving AI, a critical question remains insufficiently explored: how reliable is FHE computation on real hardware? This question is especially important because, compared with plaintext computation, FHE incurs much higher computational overhead, making it more susceptible to transient hardware faults. Moreover, data corruptions are likely to remain silent: the FHE service has no access to the underlying plaintext, causing unawareness even though the corresponding decrypted result has already been corrupted. To this end, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of SDCs in FHE ciphertext computation. Through large-scale fault-injection experiments, we characterize the vulnerability of FHE to transient faults, and through a theoretical analysis of error-propagation behaviors, we gain deeper algorithmic insight into the mechanisms underlying this vulnerability. We further assess the effectiveness of different fault-tolerance mechanisms for mitigating these faults.
title_zh: 全同态加密计算对静默数据损坏的脆弱性
abstract_zh: 全同态加密（FHE）正迅速成为隐私保护云服务的有前景基础，使对加密数据的直接计算成为可能。随着FHE实现逐渐成熟，并开始在安全金融、生物医学分析以及隐私保护人工智能等领域的实际部署中崭露头角，一个关键问题却仍未得到充分探讨：FHE在真实硬件上的计算可靠性如何？这一问题尤为重要，因为与明文计算相比，FHE的计算开销大得多，因而更容易受到瞬时硬件故障的影响。此外，数据损坏很可能悄无声息地发生：由于FHE服务无法访问底层明文，即使解密结果已被破坏，系统也毫无察觉。为此，我们对FHE密文计算中的单比特差错（SDCs）进行了全面评估。通过大规模故障注入实验，我们刻画了FHE对瞬时故障的脆弱性；并通过误差传播行为的理论分析，深入揭示了这种脆弱性的内在算法机制。我们还进一步评估了多种容错机制在缓解此类故障方面的有效性。

title: MemCollab: Cross-Agent Memory Collaboration via Contrastive Trajectory Distillation
authors: Yurui Chang, Yiran Wu, Qingyun Wu, Lu Lin
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents rely on memory mechanisms to reuse knowledge from past problem-solving experiences. Existing approaches typically construct memory in a per-agent manner, tightly coupling stored knowledge to a single model's reasoning style. In modern deployments with heterogeneous agents, a natural question arises: can a single memory system be shared across different models? We found that naively transferring memory between agents often degrades performance, as such memory entangles task-relevant knowledge with agent-specific biases. To address this challenge, we propose MemCollab, a collaborative memory framework that constructs agent-agnostic memory by contrasting reasoning trajectories generated by different agents on the same task. This contrastive process distills abstract reasoning constraints that capture shared task-level invariants while suppressing agent-specific artifacts. We further introduce a task-aware retrieval mechanism that conditions memory access on task category, ensuring that only relevant constraints are used at inference time. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks demonstrate that MemCollab consistently improves both accuracy and inference-time efficiency across diverse agents, including cross-modal-family settings. Our results show that the collaboratively constructed memory can function as a shared reasoning resource for diverse LLM-based agents.
title_zh: MemCollab：基于对比轨迹蒸馏的跨代理记忆协作
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体依赖记忆机制，以复用过往问题求解经验中的知识。现有方法通常采用单智能体方式构建记忆，将存储的知识与单一模型的推理风格紧密耦合。在现代异构智能体部署场景中，一个自然的问题浮现：能否让一个统一的记忆系统被多个不同模型共享？我们发现，简单地在智能体间迁移记忆往往会降低性能，因为此类记忆会将任务相关知识与特定智能体的偏见纠缠在一起。为应对这一挑战，我们提出 MemCollab——一种协作式记忆框架，通过对比不同智能体在同一任务上生成的推理轨迹，构建面向智能体无关的记忆。该对比过程提炼出抽象的推理约束，捕捉任务层面的共性规律，同时抑制智能体特有的噪声与偏差。此外，我们引入了一种任务感知的检索机制，根据任务类别来控制记忆访问，确保推理时仅使用相关的约束信息。在数学推理和代码生成基准上的实验表明，MemCollab 在多种智能体（包括跨模态家族设置）中均能持续提升准确率与推理效率。结果表明，通过协作构建的记忆可作为多样化 LLM 智能体共享的推理资源。

title: Polaris: A Gödel Agent Framework for Small Language Models through Experience-Abstracted Policy Repair
authors: Aditya Kakade, Vivek Srivastava, Shirish Karande
abstract: Gödel agent realize recursive self-improvement: an agent inspects its own policy and traces and then modifies that policy in a tested loop. We introduce Polaris, a Gödel agent for compact models that performs policy repair via experience abstraction, turning failures into policy updates through a structured cycle of analysis, strategy formation, abstraction, and minimal code pat ch repair with conservative checks. Unlike response level self correction or parameter tuning, Polaris makes policy level changes with small, auditable patches that persist in the policy and are reused on unseen instances within each benchmark. As part of the loop, the agent engages in meta reasoning: it explains its errors, proposes concrete revisions to its own policy, and then updates the policy. To enable cumulative policy refinement, we introduce experience abstraction, which distills failures into compact, reusable strategies that transfer to unseen instances. On MGSM, DROP, GPQA, and LitBench (covering arithmetic reasoning, compositional inference, graduate-level problem solving, and creative writing evaluation), a 7-billion-parameter model equipped with Polaris achieves consistent gains over the base policy and competitive baselines.
title_zh: 北极星：通过经验抽象化策略修复实现小语言模型的哥德尔代理框架
abstract_zh: 哥德尔智能体实现递归自我改进：一个智能体会检查自身的策略与推理过程，并在经过验证的循环中对策略进行修改。我们提出了Polaris，这是一种适用于紧凑模型的哥德尔智能体，它通过经验抽象实现策略修复，将失败转化为策略更新，形成一套结构化的分析、策略制定、抽象提炼以及最小代码修补并辅以保守验证的循环机制。与仅在响应层面进行自我修正或参数调优不同，Polaris 在策略层面进行微小且可审计的修改，这些修改会保留在策略中，并在每个基准测试的未见实例中重复使用。在该循环过程中，智能体还进行元推理：解释自身错误，提出具体的策略修订方案，并据此更新策略。为实现策略的累积性优化，我们引入了经验抽象技术，将失败案例提炼为紧凑、可复用的策略，从而能够迁移到未见过的实例上。在MGSM、DROP、GPQA和LitBench（涵盖算术推理、组合推理、研究生级问题求解及创造性写作评估）等多个任务上，配备Polaris的70亿参数模型均持续优于基础策略和现有竞争基线。

title: Parametric Knowledge and Retrieval Behavior in RAG Fine-Tuning for Electronic Design Automation
authors: Julian Oestreich, Maximilian Bley, Frank Binder, Lydia Müller, Maksym Sydorenko, André Alcalde
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) fine-tuning has shown substantial improvements over vanilla RAG, yet most studies target document question answering and often rely on standard NLP metrics that can obscure factual differences. We evaluate RAG fine-tuning for long-form text generation in electronic design automation, adapting a 7B model under five context augmentation strategies with varying retrieval conditions. We introduce TriFEX, a human-validated, triple-based evaluation pipeline that attributes generated claims to their origin-user query, context and reference-and propose Parametric Knowledge Precision (PKP), which isolates internalized knowledge by filtering out claims leaked in the prompt. We show that ROUGE and BERTScore fail to detect factual differences that our triple-based evaluation reveals. Additionally, we demonstrate that an existing metric for knowledge internalization is retrieva-sensitive, with about 75% of its cross-condition variance driven by changes in the rate at which internal knowledge is expressed (PR), rather than by changes in its actual correctness (PKP). The fine-tuned 7B variants outperform a 72B baseline on most metrics, further showing generalization across conditions and on a related benchmark. These results underscore the limitations of available metrics in RAG evaluation and show that smaller models could be reasonably well adapted to specialized tasks for cost-efficient, on-premises deployment.
title_zh: 电子设计自动化中基于检索的生成模型微调的参数化知识与检索行为
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）微调相较于原始RAG已展现出显著改进，但多数研究聚焦于文档问答任务，且常依赖标准自然语言处理指标，这些指标往往掩盖了事实性差异。本文针对电子设计自动化领域的长文本生成任务，评估了在五种不同上下文增强策略及多种检索条件下，基于70亿参数模型的RAG微调效果。我们提出了TriFEX——一种经过人工验证的三元组评估框架，能够将生成内容中的主张准确归因于其来源：用户查询、上下文信息与参考文本；并引入参数化知识精确度（PKP），通过过滤提示中泄露的陈述，从而独立衡量模型内部化知识的真实程度。实验表明，ROUGE和BERTScore等传统指标无法捕捉到TriFEX所揭示的事实性差异。此外，我们发现现有知识内化度量指标对检索敏感，约75%的跨条件方差由内部知识表达率（PR）的变化驱动，而非其实际正确性（PKP）的改变。微调后的7B模型在多数指标上优于72B基线模型，并表现出良好的跨条件泛化能力以及在相关基准测试上的优异表现。这些结果凸显了当前RAG评估指标的局限性，同时表明较小规模模型可通过合理微调，有效适配专业任务，实现成本效益高、可本地部署的应用。

title: Can Graph Foundation Models Generalize Over Architecture?
authors: Benjamin Gutteridge, Michael Bronstein, Xiaowen Dong
abstract: Graph foundation models (GFMs) have recently attracted interest due to the promise of graph neural network (GNN) architectures that generalize zero-shot across graphs of arbitrary scales, feature dimensions, and domains. While existing work has demonstrated this ability empirically across diverse real-world benchmarks, these tasks share a crucial hidden limitation: they admit a narrow set of effective GNN architectures. In particular, current domain-agnostic GFMs rely on fixed architectural backbones, implicitly assuming that a single message-passing regime suffices across tasks. In this paper, we argue that architecture adaptivity is a necessary requirement for true GFMs. We show that existing approaches are non-robust to task-dependent architectural attributes and, as a case study, use range as a minimal and measurable axis along which this limitation becomes explicit. With theoretical analysis and controlled synthetic experiments, we demonstrate that fixed-backbone GFMs provably under-reach on tasks whose architectural requirements differ from those seen at training time. To address this issue, we introduce a framework that adapts effective GNN architecture at inference time by discovering and mixing task-specific linear graph operators, enabling zero-shot generalization across tasks with heterogeneous architectural requirements, without retraining. We validate our approach on arbitrary-range synthetic tasks and a suite of real-world benchmarks, demonstrating improved performance and robustness over existing domain-agnostic GFMs.
title_zh: 图基础模型能否在架构间实现泛化？
abstract_zh: 图基础模型（Graph Foundation Models, GFMs）近年来受到广泛关注，原因在于图神经网络（GNN）架构在跨任意规模、特征维度和领域图的零样本泛化方面展现出巨大潜力。尽管现有研究已在多种真实世界基准上实证证明了这种能力，但这些任务存在一个关键的隐含局限：它们仅适用于有限的一类有效GNN架构。具体而言，当前的领域无关GFMs依赖于固定的架构主干，隐含假设是单一的消息传递机制足以应对所有任务。本文认为，真正的GFMs必须具备架构自适应能力。我们证明，现有方法对任务相关的架构属性缺乏鲁棒性；以“范围”作为最小且可度量的轴线，我们通过案例研究揭示了这一局限性的显著表现。结合理论分析与受控的合成实验，我们展示了固定主干的GFMs在架构需求与训练阶段不同的任务上必然表现不足。为解决该问题，我们提出一种新框架，在推理阶段自适应地发现并混合特定任务的线性图算子，从而在无需重新训练的情况下实现对具有异构架构需求任务的零样本泛化。我们在任意范围的合成任务以及一系列真实世界基准上验证了该方法，结果表明其性能和鲁棒性均优于现有的领域无关GFMs。

title: Wayfinder: Automated Operating System Specialization
authors: Alexander Jung, Cezar Crăciunoiu, Nikolaos Karaolidis, Hugo Lefeuvre, Daniel Oñoro Rubio, Felipe Huici, Charalampos Rotsos, Pierre Olivier
abstract: Specializing an OS to optimize the performance of a particular application is typically a manual process that requires great expertise. Specialization through configuration lends itself well to automation; however, it is challenging due to the sheer size of the configuration space of modern OSes, the difficulty to quantify that space, the long time it takes to evaluate a configuration, and the large number of invalid configurations. Hence, existing attempts at specializing OSes automatically are limited to switching features on and off to minimize memory consumption or attack surface, and cannot target metrics such as performance. We present Wayfinder, a framework specializing the configuration of OSes completely automatically and without expert knowledge. It can specialize all aspects of an OS configuration (compile-/boot-/run-time) towards any quantifiable performance, resource consumption, or security metric, for an application processing a given workload on a given hardware setup. Wayfinder consists of an automated OS benchmarking platform, and a neural network-based search algorithm driving the specialization process. This is achieved by learning on the fly which configuration parameters and values impact performance the most, and which ones lead to runtime failures. Optionally, a model pre-trained on one application can be reused to accelerate the specialization of related applications. We evaluate Wayfinder on two OSes, four applications, and two target metrics: Wayfinder fully automatically identifies specialized configurations with up to 24% application performance improvement and 8.5% memory usage reduction compared to default configurations. We highlight the benefits of our neural network, reaching good solutions faster than competing approaches (random and Bayesian), and successfully transferring knowledge between related applications.
title_zh: 导航者：自动化操作系统专业化
abstract_zh: 针对特定应用程序优化操作系统性能，通常是一个需要高度专业知识的繁琐手动过程。通过配置实现的操作系统定制化虽适合自动化，但面临诸多挑战：现代操作系统的配置空间极其庞大且难以量化，评估单个配置耗时极长，同时存在大量无效配置。因此，现有自动操作系统定制方法仅限于开关功能以最小化内存占用或攻击面，无法针对诸如性能等指标进行优化。我们提出Wayfinder——一个完全自动化的操作系统配置优化框架，无需专家知识即可实现对操作系统配置的全面优化。该框架可针对给定硬件环境上处理特定工作负载的应用程序，自动优化所有操作系统配置层面（编译时、启动时、运行时），并针对任意可量化的性能、资源消耗或安全指标进行调优。Wayfinder由一个自动化的操作系统基准测试平台和基于神经网络的搜索算法组成，能够实时学习哪些配置参数及其取值对性能影响最大，以及哪些会导致运行时错误。此外，若已有一个应用上的预训练模型，还可用于加速相关应用的优化过程。我们在两个操作系统、四种应用及两种目标指标上对Wayfinder进行了评估，结果表明：与默认配置相比，Wayfinder能全自动识别出使应用性能最高提升24%、内存使用减少8.5%的优化配置。实验还验证了神经网络的优势：相较于随机搜索和贝叶斯优化等方法，Wayfinder能更快找到优质解，并成功实现不同相关应用间的知识迁移。

title: Bilevel Autoresearch: Meta-Autoresearching Itself
authors: Yaonan Qu, Meng Lu
abstract: If autoresearch is itself a form of research, then autoresearch can be applied to research itself. We take this idea literally: we use an autoresearch loop to optimize the autoresearch loop. Every existing autoresearch system -- from Karpathy's single-track loop to AutoResearchClaw's multi-batch extension and EvoScientist's persistent memory -- was improved by a human who read the code, identified a bottleneck, and wrote new code. We ask whether an LLM can do the same, autonomously. We present Bilevel Autoresearch, a bilevel framework where an outer loop meta-optimizes the inner autoresearch loop by generating and injecting new search mechanisms as Python code at runtime. The inner loop optimizes the task; the outer loop optimizes how the inner loop searches. Both loops use the same LLM -- no stronger model is needed at the meta level. On Karpathy's GPT pretraining benchmark, the meta-autoresearch outer loop achieves a 5x improvement over the standard inner loop alone (-0.045 vs. -0.009 val_bpb), while parameter-level adjustment without mechanism change yields no reliable gain. The outer loop autonomously discovers mechanisms from combinatorial optimization, multi-armed bandits, and design of experiments -- without human specification of which domains to explore. These mechanisms succeed by breaking the inner loop's deterministic search patterns, forcing exploration of directions the LLM's priors systematically avoid. The core principle is simple: if autoresearch can meta-autoresearch itself, it can, in principle, meta-autoresearch anything with a measurable objective.
title_zh: 双层自研：元自研自身
abstract_zh: 如果自研究（autoresearch）本身是一种研究形式，那么它就可以被应用于研究自身。我们对此理念采取字面意义：使用一个自研究循环来优化自研究循环本身。迄今为止所有的自研究系统——从Karpathy的单轨循环，到AutoResearchClaw的多批次扩展，再到EvoScientist的持续记忆机制——都是由人类通过阅读代码、识别瓶颈并编写新代码而得到改进的。我们提出一个问题：大型语言模型（LLM）是否也能自主完成同样的工作？为此，我们提出了双层自研究（Bilevel Autoresearch）框架：外层循环作为元优化器，通过在运行时生成并注入新的搜索机制（以Python代码形式），来优化内层自研究循环；内层循环负责优化具体任务，而外层循环则优化内层循环的搜索方式。两个循环均使用同一语言模型——无需在元层面使用更强的模型。在Karpathy的GPT预训练基准测试中，元自研究外层循环相较于仅使用标准内层循环实现了5倍的性能提升（验证集比特每字符值从-0.009降至-0.045），而仅通过参数调整但不改变搜索机制的方法则未能带来可靠收益。外层循环自主发现了来自组合优化、多臂赌博机以及实验设计等领域的搜索机制，且无需人类指定探索哪些领域。这些机制之所以有效，是因为它们打破了内层循环固有的确定性搜索模式，迫使语言模型探索其先验知识体系中系统性回避的方向。核心原理十分简单：如果自研究能够对自身进行元自研究，那么原则上它就能对任何具有可测量目标的事物进行元自研究。

title: Design Implications for Student and Educator Needs in AI-Supported Programming Learning Tools
authors: Boxuan Ma, Yinjie Xie, Huiyong Li, Gen Li, Li Chen, Atsushi Shimada, Shin'Ichi Konomi
abstract: AI-powered coding assistants can support students in programming courses by providing on-demand explanations and debugging help. However, existing research often focuses on individual tools, leaving a gap in evidence-based design recommendations that reflect both educator and student perspectives in education settings. To ground the design of learning-oriented AI coding assistants for both sides' needs, we conducted parallel surveys of educators (N=50) and students (N=90) to compare preferences about (i) how students should request help, (ii) how AI should respond, and (iii) who should control. Our results show that educators generally favored indirect scaffolding that preserves students' reasoning, whereas students were more likely to prefer direct, actionable help. Educators further highlighted the need for course-aligned constraints and instructor-facing oversight, while students emphasized timely support and clarity when stuck. Based on these findings, we discuss the interaction-focused design space and derive design implications for learning-oriented AI coding assistants, highlighting scaffolding and control mechanisms that balance students' agency with instructional constraints.
title_zh: 人工智能支持的编程学习工具对学生与教育者需求的设计启示
abstract_zh: 由人工智能驱动的编程助教能够通过提供按需解释和调试帮助，支持学生在编程课程中的学习。然而，现有研究往往聚焦于单一工具，缺乏反映教育环境中教师与学生双重视角的实证设计建议。为了更好地满足教师与学生的共同需求，我们对教育者（N=50）和学生（N=90）进行了并行调查，比较了双方在以下三个方面的需求偏好：(i) 学生应如何请求帮助，(ii) 人工智能应如何回应，以及 (iii) 谁应掌握控制权。研究结果表明，教育者普遍倾向于间接引导式支持，以保护学生的思维过程；而学生则更倾向于直接、可操作的帮助。此外，教育者强调需要与课程内容一致的约束机制及面向教师的监督功能，而学生则更关注在遇到困难时能获得及时且清晰的支持。基于这些发现，本文探讨了以交互为核心的设计空间，并提出了面向学习型AI编程助教的设计启示，重点在于平衡学生自主性与教学约束的支架策略与控制机制。

title: Can Language Models Pass Software Testing Certification Exams? a case study
authors: Fitash Ul Haq, Jordi Cabot
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) play a pivotal role in both academic research and broader societal applications. LLMs are increasingly used in software testing activities such as test case generation, selection, and repair. However, several important questions remain: (1) do LLMs possess enough information about software testing principles to perform software testing tasks effectively? (2) do LLMs possess sufficient conceptual understanding of software testing to answer software testing questions under metamorphic transformations? and (3) do certain properties of software testing questions influence the performance of LLMs? To answer these questions, this study evaluates 60 multimodal language models from both commercial vendors and the open-source community. The evaluation is performed using 30 sample exams of different types (core foundation, core advanced, specialist, and expert) from the International Software Testing Qualifications Board (ISTQB), which are used to assess the competence of human testers. In total, each model is evaluated on 1,171 questions. Furthermore, to ensure sufficient conceptual understanding, the models are also tested on exam questions transformed using context-preserving metamorphic techniques. Two models passed all the certifications by scoring at least 65% in all of the 30 certification exams, with commercial models generally outperforming open-source ones. We analyze the reasons behind incorrect answers and provide recommendations for improving the design of software testing certification exams.
title_zh: 语言模型能否通过软件测试认证考试？——一项案例研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在学术研究及更广泛的社会应用中发挥着关键作用。目前，LLMs 正被越来越多地应用于软件测试活动，如测试用例生成、选择与修复。然而，仍存在一些重要问题亟待解答：（1）LLMs 是否具备足够的软件测试原理知识，以有效执行软件测试任务？（2）LLMs 是否具备充分的软件测试概念理解能力，能够在元变换（metamorphic transformations）条件下正确回答软件测试相关问题？（3）某些软件测试问题的特性是否会影响 LLMs 的表现？为回答这些问题，本研究对来自商业厂商和开源社区的60个多模态语言模型进行了评估。评估所使用的数据集为国际软件测试资格认证委员会（ISTQB）提供的30套不同类型的模拟考试，涵盖基础核心、高级核心、专业级和专家级四个层次，这些考试原本用于评估人类测试人员的能力。每种模型共接受1,171道题目的测试。此外，为确保模型具备充分的概念理解能力，研究还采用保持上下文一致性的元变换技术对部分考题进行改造后再次测试。结果显示，有两款模型在全部30场认证考试中均取得至少65%的得分，成功通过所有认证，且商业模型整体表现优于开源模型。本文深入分析了模型出错的原因，并就如何改进软件测试认证考试的设计提出了建议。

title: Continuous Optimization for Satisfiability Modulo Theories on Linear Real Arithmetic
authors: Yunuo Cen, Daniel Ebler, Xuanyao Fong
abstract: Efficient solutions for satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) are integral in industrial applications such as hardware verification and design automation. Existing approaches are predominantly based on conflict-driven clause learning, which is structurally difficult to parallelize and therefore scales poorly. In this work, we introduce FourierSMT as a scalable and highly parallelizable continuous-variable optimization framework for SMT. We generalize the Walsh-Fourier expansion (WFE), called extended WFE (xWFE), from the Boolean domain to a mixed Boolean-real domain, which allows the use of gradient methods for SMT. This addresses the challenge of finding satisfying variable assignments to high-arity constraints by local updates of discrete variables. To reduce the evaluation complexity of xWFE, we present the extended binary decision diagram (xBDD) and map the constraints from xWFE to xBDDs. We then show that sampling the circuit-output probability (COP) of xBDDs under randomized rounding is equivalent to the expectation value of the xWFEs. This allows for efficient computation of the constraints. We show that the reduced problem is guaranteed to converge and preserves satisfiability, ensuring the soundness of the solutions. The framework is benchmarked for large-scale scheduling and placement problems with up to 10,000 variables and 700,000 constraints, achieving 8-fold speedups compared to state-of-the-art SMT solvers. These results pave the way for GPU-based optimization of SMTs with continuous systems.
title_zh: 线性实数算术上的满足性模理论的连续优化
abstract_zh: 满足模理论（SMT）的高效求解方法在工业应用中至关重要，例如硬件验证和设计自动化。现有的方法主要基于冲突驱动的子句学习（CDCL），其结构难以并行化，因此扩展性较差。本文提出了一种可扩展且高度并行化的连续变量优化框架——FourierSMT，用于解决SMT问题。我们首次将沃尔什-傅里叶展开（WFE）从布尔域推广到混合布尔-实数域，称为扩展沃尔什-傅里叶展开（xWFE），从而使得梯度方法可以应用于SMT求解。该方法通过局部更新离散变量，有效解决了高阶约束下寻找满足赋值的难题。为降低xWFE的计算复杂度，我们提出了扩展二叉决策图（xBDD），并将xWFE中的约束映射到xBDD上。随后，我们证明：在随机舍入下对xBDD电路输出概率（COP）进行采样，等价于xWFE期望值的计算。这使得约束的计算变得高效。我们进一步证明，经过简化后的问题具有收敛性，并保持原问题的可满足性，从而确保了求解结果的正确性。该框架在大规模调度与布局问题上进行了基准测试，涉及最多达10,000个变量和700,000个约束，相比当前最先进的SMT求解器实现了8倍的加速。这些成果为基于GPU的连续系统SMT优化开辟了新路径。

title: Agent Audit: A Security Analysis System for LLM Agent Applications
authors: Haiyue Zhang, Yi Nian, Yue Zhao
abstract: What should a developer inspect before deploying an LLM agent: the model, the tool code, the deployment configuration, or all three? In practice, many security failures in agent systems arise not from model weights alone, but from the surrounding software stack: tool functions that pass untrusted inputs to dangerous operations, exposed credentials in deployment artifacts, and over-privileged Model Context Protocol (MCP) configurations. We present Agent Audit, a security analysis system for LLM agent applications. Agent Audit analyzes Python agent code and deployment artifacts through an agent-aware pipeline that combines dataflow analysis, credential detection, structured configuration parsing, and privilege-risk checks. The system reports findings in terminal, JSON, and SARIF formats, enabling direct integration with local development workflows and CI/CD pipelines. On a benchmark of 22 samples with 42 annotated vulnerabilities, Agent Audit detects 40 vulnerabilities with 6 false positives, substantially improving recall over common SAST baselines while maintaining sub-second scan times. Agent Audit is open source and installable via pip, making security auditing accessible for agent systems. In the live demonstration, attendees scan vulnerable agent repositories and observe how Agent Audit identifies security risks in tool functions, prompts, and more. Findings are linked to source locations and configuration paths, and can be exported into VS Code and GitHub Code Scanning for interactive inspection.
title_zh: 代理审计：一种针对大语言模型代理应用的安全分析系统
abstract_zh:
在部署大语言模型（LLM）智能体之前，开发者应检查模型、工具代码以及部署配置——即三者都需审查。实际上，许多智能体系统中的安全漏洞并非仅源于模型权重本身，而是由其周边软件栈所引发：例如，工具函数将未经验证的输入传递给危险操作、部署产物中暴露了敏感凭证，以及过度授权的模型上下文协议（MCP）配置等。

为此，我们提出了 **Agent Audit** —— 一个专为 LLM 智能体应用设计的安全分析系统。Agent Audit 通过一种面向智能体的分析流程，对 Python 智能体代码和部署产物进行综合检测，该流程融合了数据流分析、凭证识别、结构化配置解析以及权限-风险评估。系统可将发现结果以终端输出、JSON 和 SARIF 格式报告，支持与本地开发流程及 CI/CD 管道无缝集成。

在包含 22 个样本、共 42 个已标注漏洞的基准测试中，Agent Audit 成功检测出 40 个漏洞，仅有 6 个误报，显著提升了对常见 SAST 基线的漏洞召回率，同时保持了亚秒级的扫描速度。

Agent Audit 是开源项目，可通过 pip 安装，使智能体系统的安全审计变得触手可及。在实时演示环节，参与者将扫描存在漏洞的智能体仓库，直观观察 Agent Audit 如何识别工具函数、提示词及其他组件中的安全风险。所有发现均关联到具体的源码位置和配置路径，并可导出至 VS Code 和 GitHub Code Scanning，实现交互式深入排查。

title: Caterpillar of Thoughts: The Optimal Test-Time Algorithm for Large Language Models
authors: Amir Azarmehr, Soheil Behnezhad, Alma Ghafari
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can often produce substantially better outputs when allowed to use additional test-time computation, such as sampling, chain of thought, backtracking, or revising partial solutions. Despite the growing empirical success of such techniques, there is limited theoretical understanding of how inference time computation should be structured, or what constitutes an optimal use of a fixed computation budget. We model test-time computation as an algorithm interacting with a Markov chain: at any point, the algorithm may resume generation from any previously observed state. That is, unlike standard Markov chains where the states are drawn passively, we allow the algorithm to backtrack to any previously observed state of the Markov chain at any time. Many of the existing test-time algorithms, such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT) (Wei et al., 2023), Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT) (Yao et al., 2023), or Best-of-$k$ (Brown et al., 2024) could be seen as specific algorithms in this model. We prove that while backtracking can reduce the number of generations exponentially, a very limited form of backtracking is theoretically sufficient. Namely, we show that the optimal algorithm always generates a caterpillar tree. That is, if we remove the leaves of the state tree generated by the optimal algorithm, we obtain a path. Motivated by our characterization of the optimal algorithm, we present Caterpillar of Thoughts (CaT), a new test-time computation algorithm, reducing the number of token/state generations. Our empirical evaluation shows that CaT, compared to ToT, achieves a better success rate while also reducing the number of token generations.
title_zh: 思想的毛毛虫：大语言模型测试时的最优算法
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）在允许使用额外的推理时间计算时，往往能够生成显著更优的输出，例如通过采样、思维链（Chain of Thought）、回溯或部分解决方案的修订等方式。尽管这类技术在实践中取得了越来越多的成功，但目前对于推理时间计算应如何组织，以及如何在固定计算预算下实现最优利用，仍缺乏充分的理论理解。

我们把测试时间的计算建模为一个与马尔可夫链交互的算法：在任意时刻，该算法都可以从之前观察到的任意状态重新开始生成。也就是说，不同于标准马尔可夫链中状态被动地依次生成，我们允许算法随时回溯至此前曾观察过的任意状态。许多现有的测试时间算法，如思维链（CoT）（Wei 等，2023）、思维树（ToT）（Yao 等，2023），或 Best-of-$k$（Brown 等，2024），都可以看作是这一模型中的特定算法实例。

我们证明，虽然回溯能够将生成次数呈指数级减少，但理论上只需一种非常有限形式的回溯即可达到最优。具体而言，我们证明了最优算法始终会生成一棵“毛毛虫树”（caterpillar tree）。即，若将最优算法生成的状态树中的所有叶子节点移除，剩下的结构将是一条路径。

受对最优算法的这一刻画启发，我们提出了“思维毛毛虫”（Caterpillar of Thoughts, CaT）——一种新型的测试时间计算算法，旨在减少 token 或状态的生成数量。我们的实证评估表明，与 ToT 相比，CaT 在取得更高成功率的同时，也显著减少了 token 的生成量。

title: Does Teaming-Up LLMs Improve Secure Code Generation? A Comprehensive Evaluation with Multi-LLMSecCodeEval
authors: Bushra Sabir, Shigang Liu, Seung Ick Jang, Sharif Abuadbba, Yansong Gao, Kristen Moore, SangCheol Kim, Hyoungshick Kim, Surya Nepal
abstract: Automatically generating source code from natural language using large language models (LLMs) is becoming common, yet security vulnerabilities persist despite advances in fine tuning and prompting. In this work, we systematically evaluate whether multi LLM ensembles and collaborative strategies can meaningfully improve secure code generation. We present MULTI-LLMSECCODEEVAL, a framework for assessing and enhancing security across the vulnerability management lifecycle by combining multiple LLMs with static analysis and structured collaboration. Using SecLLMEval and SecLLMHolmes, we benchmark ten pipelines spanning single model, ensemble, collaborative, and hybrid designs. Our results show that ensemble pipelines augmented with static analysis improve secure code generation over single LLM baselines by up to 47.3% on SecLLMEval and 19.3% on SecLLMHolmes, while purely LLM based collaborative pipelines yield smaller gains of 8.9% to 22.3%. Hybrid pipelines that integrate ensembling, detection, and patching achieve the strongest security performance, outperforming the best ensemble baseline by 1.78% to 4.72% and collaborative baselines by 19.81% to 26.78%. Ablation studies reveal that model scale alone does not ensure security. Smaller, structured multi model ensembles consistently outperform large monolithic LLMs. Overall, our findings demonstrate that secure code does not emerge from scale, but from carefully orchestrated multi model system design.
title_zh: 联合使用大语言模型能否提升安全代码生成？基于 Multi-LLMSecCodeEval 的全面评估
abstract_zh: 利用大型语言模型（LLMs）从自然语言自动生成源代码正变得越来越普遍，但即便在微调和提示工程方面取得进展，安全漏洞依然存在。在本研究中，我们系统性地评估了多 LLM 集成与协作策略是否能够显著提升安全代码生成能力。我们提出了 MULTI-LLMSECCODEEVAL 框架，通过结合多个 LLM、静态分析以及结构化协作，全面评估并增强漏洞管理生命周期中的安全性。基于 SecLLMEval 和 SecLLMHolmes 两个基准测试，我们对十种不同设计的流水线进行了评测，涵盖单模型、集成、协作及混合架构。实验结果表明，引入静态分析的集成流水线在 SecLLMEval 上相比单 LLM 基线最多可提升 47.3% 的安全生成效果，在 SecLLMHolmes 上提升达 19.3%；而纯 LLM 协作流水线仅带来 8.9% 至 22.3% 的小幅改进。混合流水线通过整合集成、检测与修复机制，展现出最强的安全性能，相较于最佳集成基线提升 1.78% 至 4.72%，相较于协作基线更是提升高达 19.81% 至 26.78%。消融实验进一步揭示，模型规模本身并不能保证安全性；相比之下，小型但结构化的多模型集成系统始终优于大型单一模型。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明：安全代码并非源于模型规模，而是来自精心设计的多模型系统协同机制。

title: JFTA-Bench: Evaluate LLM's Ability of Tracking and Analyzing Malfunctions Using Fault Trees
authors: Yuhui Wang, Zhixiong Yang, Ming Zhang, Shihan Dou, Zhiheng Xi, Enyu Zhou, Senjie Jin, Yujiong Shen, Dingwei Zhu, Yi Dong, Tao Gui, Qi Zhang, Xuanjing Huang
abstract: In the maintenance of complex systems, fault trees are used to locate problems and provide targeted solutions. To enable fault trees stored as images to be directly processed by large language models, which can assist in tracking and analyzing malfunctions, we propose a novel textual representation of fault trees. Building on it, we construct a benchmark for multi-turn dialogue systems that emphasizes robust interaction in complex environments, evaluating a model's ability to assist in malfunction localization, which contains $3130$ entries and $40.75$ turns per entry on average. We train an end-to-end model to generate vague information to reflect user behavior and introduce long-range rollback and recovery procedures to simulate user error scenarios, enabling assessment of a model's integrated capabilities in task tracking and error recovery, and Gemini 2.5 pro archives the best performance.
title_zh: JFTA-Bench：基于故障树评估大语言模型追踪与分析故障的能力
abstract_zh: 在复杂系统的维护中，故障树被用于定位问题并提供针对性的解决方案。为了使以图像形式存储的故障树能够直接由大语言模型处理，从而辅助故障追踪与分析，我们提出了一种故障树的新型文本表示方法。基于此表示，我们构建了一个面向多轮对话系统的基准数据集，强调在复杂环境中的鲁棒交互能力，用于评估模型在故障定位方面的表现。该基准包含3130个条目，平均每条目40.75轮对话。我们训练了一个端到端模型，用于生成反映用户行为的模糊信息，并引入长距离回滚与恢复机制，以模拟用户出错场景，从而全面评估模型在任务追踪与错误恢复方面的综合能力。实验结果表明，Gemini 2.5 Pro在各项指标上表现最佳。

title: ConceptCoder: Improve Code Reasoning via Concept Learning
authors: Md Mahbubur Rahman, Hengbo Tong, Wei Le
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promising results for software engineering applications, but still struggle with code reasoning tasks such as vulnerability detection (VD). We introduce ConceptCoder, a fine-tuning method that simulates human code inspection: models are trained to first recognize code concepts and then perform reasoning on top of these concepts. In prior work, concepts are extracted by multimodal models or LLMs to explain vision and natural language models. Our work is the first to formulate concepts for code. We define code concepts as human-understandable semantic properties of code and train models to learn such concepts. Our evaluation shows that this approach significantly improves VD accuracy, from 66.32 to 72.15 F1 on average over 9 open-source LLMs. ConceptCoder achieves the best VD performance compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, including fine-tuned SOTA open-source LLMs and prompted proprietary models such as GPT-5.2 and Claude-Opus-4.5. Our approach also scales: concepts defined from four types of vulnerabilities benefit general vulnerability datasets with 134 CWEs. We further demonstrate that concept-based fine-tuning generalizes beyond VD and improves branch prediction. We release our code and datasets at https://figshare.com/s/1decab8232c653b44f71.
title_zh: ConceptCoder：通过概念学习提升代码推理能力
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在软件工程应用中已展现出令人瞩目的成果，但在代码推理任务（如漏洞检测，VD）方面仍面临挑战。我们提出了 ConceptCoder，一种模拟人类代码审查过程的微调方法：模型首先识别代码概念，然后基于这些概念进行推理。以往研究中，概念由多模态模型或 LLM 提取，用于解释视觉和自然语言模型。而我们的工作首次为代码定义了“概念”。我们将代码概念定义为人类可理解的代码语义属性，并训练模型学习这些概念。评估结果表明，该方法显著提升了漏洞检测的准确率，使 9 个开源 LLM 的平均 F1 值从 66.32 提升至 72.15。与当前最先进的（SOTA）基线方法相比，包括经过微调的 SOTA 开源 LLM 以及提示工程的专有模型（如 GPT-5.2 和 Claude-Opus-4.5），ConceptCoder 在漏洞检测性能上表现最佳。此外，该方法具有良好的可扩展性：基于四类漏洞定义的概念，能够有效提升包含 134 个 CWE 的通用漏洞数据集的表现。我们还进一步证明，基于概念的微调不仅适用于漏洞检测，还能泛化到分支预测任务并提升其性能。相关代码与数据集已公开发布于 https://figshare.com/s/1decab8232c653b44f71。

title: MuSe: a Mutation Testing Plugin for the Remix IDE
authors: Gerardo Iuliano, Daniele Carangelo, Carmine Calabrese, Dario Di Nucci
abstract: Mutation testing is a technique to assess the effectiveness of test suites by introducing artificial faults into programs. Although mutation testing plugins are available for many platforms and languages, none is currently available for Remix-IDE, the most widely used Integrated Development Environment for the entire contract development journey, used by users of all knowledge levels, and serves as a learning lab for teaching and experimenting with Ethereum. The quality and security of smart contracts are crucial in blockchain systems, as even minor issues can result in substantial financial losses. This paper proposes MuSe, a mutation testing plugin for the Remix-IDE. MuSe includes traditional, Solidity-specific, and security-oriented mutation operators. Its integration into the Remix-IDE eliminates the need for additional setup and lowers the entry barrier. As a result, developers and researchers can immediately leverage mutation testing to assess the effectiveness of their test suites and identify potential issues in smart contracts. We provide a demo video showing MuSe: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MIFk9exTDu0 and its repository: https://github.com/GerardoIuliano/MuSe-Remix-Plugin.
title_zh: MuSe：Remix IDE 的变异测试插件
abstract_zh: 变异测试是一种通过向程序中引入人工故障来评估测试套件有效性的技术。尽管许多平台和编程语言都已有变异测试插件，但目前尚无适用于Remix-IDE的插件。Remix-IDE是整个智能合约开发流程中最广泛使用的集成开发环境，被各类知识水平的用户使用，并作为教学和实验以太坊的实践实验室。在区块链系统中，智能合约的质量与安全性至关重要，因为即使是微小的问题也可能导致巨大的财务损失。本文提出了一款专为Remix-IDE设计的变异测试插件——MuSe。MuSe包含传统的、针对Solidity语言的以及面向安全性的变异操作符。其与Remix-IDE的无缝集成无需额外配置，显著降低了使用门槛。因此，开发者和研究人员可以立即利用变异测试来评估其测试套件的有效性，并发现智能合约中的潜在问题。我们提供了MuSe的演示视频：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MIFk9exTDu0，以及项目仓库地址：https://github.com/GerardoIuliano/MuSe-Remix-Plugin。

title: Agent-Sentry: Bounding LLM Agents via Execution Provenance
authors: Rohan Sequeira, Stavros Damianakis, Umar Iqbal, Konstantinos Psounis
abstract: Agentic computing systems, which autonomously spawn new functionalities based on natural language instructions, are becoming increasingly prevalent. While immensely capable, these systems raise serious security, privacy, and safety concerns. Fundamentally, the full set of functionalities offered by these systems, combined with their probabilistic execution flows, is not known beforehand. Given this lack of characterization, it is non-trivial to validate whether a system has successfully carried out the user's intended task or instead executed irrelevant actions, potentially as a consequence of compromise. In this paper, we propose Agent-Sentry, a framework that attempts to bound agentic systems to address this problem. Our key insight is that agentic systems are designed for specific use cases and therefore need not expose unbounded or unspecified functionalities. Once bounded, these systems become easier to scrutinize. Agent-Sentry operationalizes this insight by uncovering frequent functionalities offered by an agentic system, along with their execution traces, to construct behavioral bounds. It then learns a policy from these traces and blocks tool calls that deviate from learned behaviors or that misalign with user intent. Our evaluation shows that Agent-Sentry helps prevent over 90\% of attacks that attempt to trigger out-of-bounds executions, while preserving up to 98\% of system utility.
title_zh: 代理-哨兵：通过执行溯源约束大语言模型代理
abstract_zh: 代理计算系统正变得越来越普遍，这类系统能够根据自然语言指令自主生成新的功能。尽管其能力极为强大，但同时也带来了严重的安全、隐私和安全风险。根本上讲，这些系统所提供的全部功能，加上其概率性执行流程，事先无法完全知晓。由于缺乏这种特征描述，验证系统是否成功执行了用户的预期任务，还是意外地执行了无关操作（可能源于系统被攻破），变得十分困难。在本文中，我们提出了Agent-Sentry框架，旨在对代理系统进行约束以解决这一问题。我们的核心洞察是：代理系统是为特定使用场景设计的，因此无需暴露无限或未明确定义的功能。一旦对系统功能加以限制，便更容易对其进行审查。Agent-Sentry通过识别代理系统中频繁出现的功能及其执行轨迹，构建行为边界；随后从这些轨迹中学习策略，并阻止那些偏离已学行为或与用户意图不符的工具调用。评估结果表明，Agent-Sentry可有效防止超过90%试图触发越界执行的攻击，同时保留高达98%的系统实用性。

title: Empirical Comparison of Agent Communication Protocols for Task Orchestration
authors: Ivan Dobrovolskyi
abstract: Context. Nowadays, artificial intelligence agent systems are transforming from single-tool interactions to complex multi-agent orchestrations. As a result, two competing communication protocols have emerged: a tool integration protocol that standardizes how agents invoke external tools, and an inter-agent delegation protocol that enables autonomous agents to discover and delegate tasks to one another. Despite widespread industry adoption by dozens of enterprise partners, no empirical comparison of these protocols exists in the literature. Objective. The goal of this work is to develop the first systematic benchmark comparing tool-integration-only, multi-agent delegation, and hybrid architectures across standardized queries at three complexity levels, and to quantify the trade-offs in response time, context window consumption, monetary cost, error recovery, and implementation complexity.
title_zh: 任务编排中智能体通信协议的实证比较
abstract_zh: 背景。如今，人工智能代理系统正从单一工具交互演变为复杂的多代理协同架构。由此，两种竞争性的通信协议应运而生：一种是工具集成协议，用于标准化代理调用外部工具的方式；另一种是代理间任务委派协议，使自主代理能够发现并将其任务委派给其他代理。尽管这两种协议已获得数十家企业的广泛采用，但目前学术文献中尚无对这两种协议的实证比较研究。目标。本研究旨在构建首个系统性基准测试，对仅支持工具集成、多代理委派以及混合架构三种模式，在三个不同复杂度水平的标准查询下进行对比，并量化其在响应时间、上下文窗口使用量、成本开销、错误恢复能力以及实现复杂度等方面的权衡。

title: Efficient Hallucination Detection: Adaptive Bayesian Estimation of Semantic Entropy with Guided Semantic Exploration
authors: Qiyao Sun, Xingming Li, Xixiang He, Ao Cheng, Xuanyu Ji, Hailun Lu, Runke Huang, Qingyong Hu
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in various natural language processing tasks, yet they remain prone to generating factually incorrect outputs known as hallucinations. While recent approaches have shown promise for hallucination detection by repeatedly sampling from LLMs and quantifying the semantic inconsistency among the generated responses, they rely on fixed sampling budgets that fail to adapt to query complexity, resulting in computational inefficiency. We propose an Adaptive Bayesian Estimation framework for Semantic Entropy with Guided Semantic Exploration, which dynamically adjusts sampling requirements based on observed uncertainty. Our approach employs a hierarchical Bayesian framework to model the semantic distribution, enabling dynamic control of sampling iterations through variance-based thresholds that terminate generation once sufficient certainty is achieved. We also develop a perturbation-based importance sampling strategy to systematically explore the semantic space. Extensive experiments on four QA datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior hallucination detection performance with significant efficiency gains. In low-budget scenarios, our approach requires about 50% fewer samples to achieve comparable detection performance to existing methods, while delivers an average AUROC improvement of 12.6% under the same sampling budget.
title_zh: 高效幻觉检测：基于引导语义探索的自适应贝叶斯语义熵估计
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在各种自然语言处理任务中取得了显著成功，但仍容易生成事实性错误的输出，即所谓的“幻觉”问题。尽管近期一些方法通过多次从LLM采样并量化生成结果之间的语义不一致性，在幻觉检测方面展现出良好前景，但这些方法依赖于固定的采样预算，无法根据查询复杂度自适应调整，导致计算效率低下。为此，我们提出一种基于引导语义探索的自适应贝叶斯语义熵估计框架（Adaptive Bayesian Estimation framework for Semantic Entropy with Guided Semantic Exploration），能够根据观测到的不确定性动态调整采样需求。该方法采用分层贝叶斯框架建模语义分布，通过基于方差的阈值动态控制采样迭代次数，一旦达到足够的确定性便终止生成过程。此外，我们还设计了一种基于扰动的重要性采样策略，以系统性地探索语义空间。在四个问答数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在幻觉检测性能上表现更优，并实现了显著的效率提升：在低预算场景下，仅需约50%的样本即可达到与现有方法相当的检测效果；而在相同采样预算下，平均AUROC指标提升12.6%。

title: Beyond Binary Correctness: Scaling Evaluation of Long-Horizon Agents on Subjective Enterprise Tasks
authors: Abhishek Chandwani, Ishan Gupta
abstract: Large language models excel on objectively verifiable tasks such as math and programming, where evaluation reduces to unit tests or a single correct answer. In contrast, real-world enterprise work is often subjective and context-dependent: success hinges on organizational goals, user intent, and the quality of intermediate artifacts produced across long, multi-tool workflows. We introduce LH-Bench, a three-pillar evaluation design that moves beyond binary correctness to score autonomous, long-horizon execution on subjective enterprise tasks. The pillars are: (i) expert-grounded rubrics that give LLM judges the domain context needed to score subjective work, (ii) curated ground-truth artifacts that enable stepwise reward signals (e.g., chapter-level annotation for content tasks), and (iii) pairwise human preference evaluation for convergent validation. We show that domain-authored rubrics provide substantially more reliable evaluation signals than LLM-authored rubrics (kappa = 0.60 vs. 0.46), and that human preference judgments confirm the same top-tier separation (p < 0.05), evidence that expert-grounded evaluation can scale without sacrificing reliability. We release public datasets and report results on two environments: Figma-to-code (33 real .fig tasks against the Figma API via MCP) and Programmatic content (41 courses comprising 183 individually-evaluated chapters on a course platform serving 30+ daily users).
title_zh: 超越二元正确性：面向主观企业任务的长时程智能体评估扩展
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型在可客观验证的任务中表现优异，例如数学和编程，其评估可简化为单元测试或单一正确答案。然而，现实世界的企业工作往往具有主观性和情境依赖性：成功与否取决于组织目标、用户意图以及在长期、多工具工作流中生成的中间成果质量。为此，我们提出了LH-Bench，一种三支柱评估框架，旨在超越简单的对错判断，对大模型在主观企业任务上的自主、长周期执行能力进行评分。该框架的三大支柱包括：(i) 专家制定的评分标准，为LLM评审者提供完成主观任务所需的领域背景；(ii) 精心构建的真实参考成果，支持分步奖励信号（例如内容任务中的章节级标注）；(iii) 成对的人类偏好评估，用于结果的收敛性验证。实验表明，由领域专家撰写的评分标准所提供的评估信号显著优于由LLM自动生成的标准（kappa值分别为0.60 vs. 0.46），且人类偏好判断进一步证实了顶级性能之间的显著差异（p < 0.05），证明基于专家的评估体系可在保持可靠性的同时实现规模化。我们已公开发布相关数据集，并报告了在两个环境中的评估结果：Figma转代码（33个真实.FIG文件任务，通过MCP对接Figma API）与程序化内容生成（41门课程，共183个独立评估章节，部署于服务30多名日活跃用户的课程平台）。

title: A Study of Scientific Computational Notebook Quality
authors: Shun Kashiwa, Ayla Kurdak, Savitha Ravi, Ridhi Srikanth, Angel Thakur, Sonia Chandra, Jonathan Truong, Michael Coblenz
abstract: The quality of scientific code is a critical concern for the research community. Poorly written code can result in irreproducible results, incorrect findings, and slower scientific progress. In this study, we evaluate scientific code quality across three dimensions: reproducibility, readability, and reusability. We curated a corpus of 518 code repositories by analyzing Code Availability statements from all 1239 Nature publications in 2024. To assess code quality, we employed multiple methods, including manual attempts to reproduce Jupyter notebooks, documentation reviews, and analyses of code clones and mutation patterns. Our results reveal major challenges in scientific code quality. Of the 19 notebooks we attempted to execute, only two were reproducible, primarily due to missing data files and dependency issues. Code duplication was also common, with 326 clone classes of at least 10 lines and three instances found among 637 of the 1510 notebooks in our corpus. These duplications frequently involved tasks such as visualization, data processing, and statistical analysis. Moreover, our mutation analysis showed that scientific notebooks often exhibit tangled state changes, complicating comprehension and reasoning. The prevalence of these issues -- unreproducible code, widespread duplication, and tangled state management -- underscores the need for improved tools and abstractions to help science build reproducible, readable and reusable software.
title_zh: 科学计算笔记本质量研究
abstract_zh: 科学代码的质量是科研界面临的一个关键问题。编写质量不佳的代码可能导致研究结果无法复现、得出错误结论，从而减缓科学进步的步伐。在本研究中，我们从可复现性、可读性和可重用性三个维度评估了科学代码的质量。我们通过分析2024年《自然》（Nature）期刊全部1239篇论文中的代码可用性声明，整理出一个包含518个代码仓库的语料库。为评估代码质量，我们采用了多种方法，包括手动尝试复现Jupyter笔记本、审查文档，以及对代码克隆和变异模式进行分析。研究结果揭示了科学代码质量存在诸多严重挑战：在我们尝试运行的19个笔记本中，仅有两个能够成功复现，主要原因是缺少数据文件和依赖项问题；代码重复现象也十分普遍，在我们语料库中的1510个笔记本中，共发现637个存在代码克隆，涉及至少10行代码的克隆类达326个，且有三处重复实例；这些重复多集中于可视化、数据处理和统计分析等任务。此外，我们的变异分析表明，科学笔记本中经常出现状态变化相互纠缠的情况，这大大增加了理解与推理的难度。上述问题——代码不可复现、广泛存在的代码重复以及复杂的状态管理——凸显了亟需开发更先进的工具与抽象机制，以帮助科研人员构建可复现、可读性强且可重用的软件。

title: GeoTikzBridge: Advancing Multimodal Code Generation for Geometric Perception and Reasoning
authors: Jiayin Sun, Caixia Sun, Boyu Yang, Hailin Li, Xiao Chen, Yi Zhang, Errui Ding, Liang Li, Chao Deng, Junlan Feng
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable perceptual and reasoning abilities. However, they struggle to perceive fine-grained geometric structures, constraining their ability of geometric understanding and visual reasoning. To address this, we propose GeoTikzBridge, a framework that enhances local geometric perception and visual reasoning through tikz-based code generation. Within this framework, we build two models supported by two complementary datasets. The GeoTikzBridge-Base model is trained on GeoTikz-Base dataset, the largest image-to-tikz dataset to date with 2.5M pairs (16 $\times$ larger than existing open-sourced datasets). This process is achieved via iterative data expansion and a localized geometric transformation strategy. Subsequently, GeoTikzBridge-Instruct is fine-tuned on GeoTikz-Instruct dataset which is the first instruction-augmented tikz dataset supporting visual reasoning. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our models achieve state-of-the-art performance among open-sourced MLLMs. Furthermore, GeoTikzBridge models can serve as plug-and-play reasoning modules for any MLLM(LLM), enhancing reasoning performance in geometric problem-solving. Datasets and codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/sjy-1995/GeoTikzBridge-Advancing-Multimodal-Code-Generation-for-Geometric-Perception-and-Reasoning.
title_zh: GeoTikzBridge：推动几何感知与推理的多模态代码生成
abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）最近展现出卓越的感知与推理能力。然而，它们在捕捉细微几何结构方面仍存在困难，限制了其几何理解与视觉推理能力。为解决这一问题，我们提出了GeoTikzBridge框架，通过基于TikZ代码生成的方式增强局部几何感知与视觉推理能力。该框架构建了两个模型，并依托两个互补的数据集进行训练。GeoTikzBridge-Base模型基于目前规模最大的图像到TikZ数据集——GeoTikz-Base，该数据集包含250万对图像-TikZ代码样本（比现有开源数据集大16倍）。该数据集的构建通过迭代式数据扩展和局部几何变换策略实现。随后，GeoTikzBridge-Instruct模型在GeoTikz-Instruct数据集上进行微调，该数据集是首个支持视觉推理的指令增强型TikZ数据集。大量实验结果表明，我们的模型在开源MLLM中达到了当前最优性能。此外，GeoTikzBridge模型可作为即插即用的推理模块，集成至任意MLLM（或LLM）中，显著提升其在几何问题求解中的推理表现。相关数据集与代码已公开，地址为：https://github.com/sjy-1995/GeoTikzBridge-Advancing-Multimodal-Code-Generation-for-Geometric-Perception-and-Reasoning。

title: Improving LLM Predictions via Inter-Layer Structural Encoders
authors: Tom Ulanovski, Eyal Blyachman, Maya Bechler-Speicher
abstract: The standard practice in Large Language Models (LLMs) is to base predictions on the final-layer token representations. Recent studies, however, show that intermediate layers encode substantial information, which may contain more task-relevant features than the final-layer representations alone. Importantly, it was shown that for different tasks, different layers may be optimal. In this work we introduce Inter-Layer Structural Encoders (ILSE), a powerful structural approach to learn one effective representation from the LLM's internal layer representations all together. Central to ILSE is Cayley-Encoder, a mathematically grounded geometric encoder that leverages expander Cayley graphs for efficient inter-layer information propagation. We evaluate ILSE across 13 classification and semantic similarity tasks with 9 pre-trained LLMs ranging from 14 million to 8 billion parameters. ILSE consistently outperforms baselines and existing approaches, achieving up to 44% improvement in accuracy and 25% in similarity metrics. We further show that ILSE is data-efficient in few-shot regimes and can make small LLMs competitive with substantially larger models.
title_zh: 通过层间结构编码器提升大语言模型的预测能力
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的标准做法是基于最后一层的词元表示进行预测。然而，近期研究发现，中间层也编码了大量信息，其中可能包含比仅使用最后一层表示更相关的任务特征。尤为重要的是，研究表明，针对不同任务，最优的层可能各不相同。在本工作中，我们提出了**层间结构编码器**（Inter-Layer Structural Encoders, ILSE），这是一种强大的结构性方法，旨在从LLM内部所有层次的表示中联合学习一个高效表征。ILSE的核心是**凯莱编码器**（Cayley-Encoder），一种具有数学基础的几何编码器，利用扩增型凯莱图实现高效的层间信息传播。我们在13个分类和语义相似性任务上，对9个预训练LLM（参数量从1400万到80亿不等）进行了评估。结果表明，ILSE始终优于基线方法及现有技术，在准确率上最高提升达44%，在相似性度量上提升25%。此外，我们还证明了ILSE在少样本场景下具有优异的数据效率，能够使小型LLM的表现媲美远大于其规模的大型模型。

title: The Evolution of Tool Use in LLM Agents: From Single-Tool Call to Multi-Tool Orchestration
authors: Haoyuan Xu, Chang Li, Xinyan Ma, Xianhao Ou, Zihan Zhang, Tao He, Xiangyu Liu, Zixiang Wang, Jiafeng Liang, Zheng Chu, Runxuan Liu, Rongchuan Mu, Ming Liu, Bing Qin
abstract: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to access external information, invoke software systems, and act in digital environments beyond what can be solved from model parameters alone. Early research mainly studied whether a model could select and execute a correct single tool call. As agent systems evolve, however, the central problem has shifted from isolated invocation to multi-tool orchestration over long trajectories with intermediate state, execution feedback, changing environments, and practical constraints such as safety, cost, and verifiability. We comprehensively review recent progress in multi-tool LLM agents and analyzes the state of the art in this rapidly developing area. First, we unify task formulations and distinguish single-call tool use from long-horizon orchestration. Then, we organize the literature around six core dimensions: inference-time planning and execution, training and trajectory construction, safety and control, efficiency under resource constraints, capability completeness in open environments, and benchmark design and evaluation. We further summarize representative applications in software engineering, enterprise workflows, graphical user interfaces, and mobile systems. Finally, we discuss major challenges and outline future directions for building reliable, scalable, and verifiable multi-tool agents.
title_zh: 大型语言模型智能体中工具使用的演进：从单工具调用到多工具协同
abstract_zh: 工具使用使大型语言模型（LLMs）能够访问外部信息、调用软件系统，并在数字环境中执行任务，突破了仅依赖模型参数所能解决的局限。早期研究主要关注模型是否能够正确选择并执行单一工具调用。然而，随着智能体系统的发展，核心问题已从孤立的工具调用，转变为在长轨迹中对多种工具进行协调，涉及中间状态、执行反馈、环境变化以及安全、成本和可验证性等实际约束。本文全面回顾了多工具LLM智能体领域的最新进展，并分析了该快速发展的研究方向的现状。首先，我们统一了任务建模范式，区分了单次调用工具使用与长周期协调的不同；接着，围绕六个核心维度对相关文献进行了系统梳理：推理时的规划与执行、训练与轨迹构建、安全与控制、资源受限下的效率、开放环境中能力的完备性，以及基准设计与评估方法。此外，我们总结了在软件工程、企业工作流、图形用户界面及移动系统中的代表性应用。最后，我们探讨了当前面临的主要挑战，并展望了构建可靠、可扩展且可验证的多工具智能体的未来发展方向。

title: ABSTRAL: Automatic Design of Multi-Agent Systems Through Iterative Refinement and Topology Optimization
authors: Weijia Song, Jiashu Yue, Zhe Pang
abstract: How should multi-agent systems be designed, and can that design knowledge be captured in a form that is inspectable, revisable, and transferable? We introduce ABSTRAL, a framework that treats MAS architecture as an evolving natural-language document, an artifact refined through contrastive trace analysis. Three findings emerge. First, we provide a precise measurement of the multi-agent coordination tax: under fixed turn budgets, ensembles achieve only 26% turn efficiency, with 66% of tasks exhausting the limit, yet still improve over single-agent baselines by discovering parallelizable task decompositions. Second, design knowledge encoded in documents transfers: topology reasoning and role templates learned on one domain provide a head start on new domains, with transferred seeds matching coldstart iteration 3 performance in a single iteration. Third, contrastive trace analysis discovers specialist roles absent from any initial design, a capability no prior system demonstrates. On SOPBench (134 bank tasks, deterministic oracle), ABSTRAL reaches 70% validation / 65.96% test pass rate with a GPT-4o backbone. We release the converged documents as inspectable design rationale.
title_zh: ABSTRAL：通过迭代优化与拓扑优化实现多智能体系统的自动设计
abstract_zh: 多智能体系统应如何设计？这种设计知识能否以可检查、可修改且可迁移的形式被捕捉？我们提出了 ABSTRAL 框架，该框架将多智能体系统（MAS）架构视为一个不断演进的自然语言文档，通过对比性轨迹分析进行持续优化。研究得出三个关键发现：第一，我们精确测量了多智能体协作的“协调成本”：在固定回合预算下，集成系统仅实现 26% 的回合效率，66% 的任务耗尽了预算上限，但依然优于单智能体基线，原因在于其能够发现可并行的任务分解方式。第二，文档中编码的设计知识具有可迁移性：在某一领域学习到的拓扑推理模式与角色模板，能为新领域提供显著优势，仅用一次迭代即达到冷启动第 3 轮的性能水平。第三，对比性轨迹分析揭示了初始设计中未包含的专家角色，这一能力是以往任何系统所不具备的。在 SOPBench 基准测试（134 个银行任务，确定性真值）上，采用 GPT-4o 作为核心模型的 ABSTRAL 达到了 70% 的验证集通过率和 65.96% 的测试集通过率。我们已公开最终收敛的文档，作为可检查的设计 rationale。

title: BlindMarket: Enabling Verifiable, Confidential, and Traceable IP Core Distribution in Zero-Trust Settings
authors: Zhaoxiang Liu, Samuel Judson, Raj Dutta, Mark Santolucito, Xiaolong Guo, Ning Luo
abstract: We present BlindMarket, an end-to-end zero-trust distribution framework for hardware IP cores. BlindMarket allows two parties, the IP user and the IP vendor, to complete an IP trading process with strong guarantees of verifiability and confidentiality before the transaction, and then traceability after. We propose verification heuristics and adapt the cone of influence-based design pruning to overcome the limited scalability common to cryptographic protocols and the hardness of the underlying hardware verification. We systematically evaluate our framework on a diverse set of real-world hardware benchmarks, and the results demonstrate that BlindMarket effectively completes across a diverse set of real-world hardware IP cores, demonstrating successful verification on 12 out of 13 designs and substantial performance improvements enabled by design pruning and control-flow guided heuristics.
title_zh: BlindMarket：在零信任环境中实现可验证、保密且可追溯的IP核分发
abstract_zh: 我们提出BlindMarket，这是一个面向硬件IP核的端到端零信任分发框架。BlindMarket使IP用户与IP供应商双方能够在交易前获得强有力的可验证性与保密性保障，并在交易后实现可追溯性。为克服密码协议普遍存在的可扩展性限制以及底层硬件验证的复杂性难题，我们提出了验证启发式方法，并采用基于影响锥的设计剪枝技术。我们在一系列真实世界硬件基准上对框架进行了系统性评估，结果表明，BlindMarket能够有效完成多种真实世界硬件IP核的交易，在13个设计中成功验证了12个，同时通过设计剪枝和控制流引导的启发式方法实现了显著的性能提升。

title: ReqFusion: A Multi-Provider Framework for Automated PEGS Analysis Across Software Domains
authors: Muhammad Khalid, Manuel Oriol, Yilmaz Uygun
abstract: Requirements engineering is a vital, yet labor-intensive, stage in the software development process. This article introduces ReqFusion: an AI-enhanced system that automates the extraction, classification, and analysis of software requirements utilizing multiple Large Language Model (LLM) providers. The architecture of ReqFusion integrates OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, and Groq models to extract functional and non-functional requirements from various documentation formats (PDF, DOCX, and PPTX) in academic, industrial, and tender proposal contexts. The system uses a domain-independent extraction method and generates requirements following the Project, Environment, Goal, and System (PEGS) approach introduced by Bertrand Meyer. The main idea is that, because the PEGS format is detailed, LLMs have more information and cues about the requirements, producing better results than a simple generic request. An ablation study confirms this hypothesis: PEGS-guided prompting achieves an F1 score of 0.88, compared to 0.71 for generic prompting under the same multi-provider configuration. The evaluation used 18 real-world documents to generate 226 requirements through automated classification, with 54.9% functional and 45.1% nonfunctional across academic, business, and technical domains. An extended evaluation on five projects with 1,050 requirements demonstrated significant improvements in extraction accuracy and a 78% reduction in analysis time compared to manual methods. The multi-provider architecture enhances reliability through model consensus and fallback mechanisms, while the PEGS-based approach ensures comprehensive coverage of all requirement categories.
title_zh: ReqFusion：一种跨软件领域的自动化PEGS分析多提供商框架
abstract_zh: 需求工程是软件开发过程中至关重要但又劳动密集的阶段。本文介绍了一种名为ReqFusion的人工智能增强系统，该系统利用多个大型语言模型（LLM）提供商，实现对软件需求的自动化提取、分类与分析。ReqFusion的架构整合了OpenAI GPT、Anthropic Claude以及Groq等模型，能够从学术、工业及投标提案等不同场景下的多种文档格式（PDF、DOCX和PPTX）中提取功能性和非功能性需求。该系统采用领域无关的提取方法，并依据Bertrand Meyer提出的“项目、环境、目标与系统”（PEGS）框架生成需求。其核心思想在于：由于PEGS格式信息详尽，为LLM提供了更丰富的上下文和线索，从而相比简单的通用请求，能产生更高质量的结果。消融实验验证了这一假设：在相同的多提供商配置下，采用PEGS引导提示的方法获得了0.88的F1分数，而通用提示仅达到0.71。评估基于18份真实文档，自动生成226条需求，其中54.9%为功能性需求，45.1%为非功能性需求，覆盖学术、商业和技术等多个领域。对五个项目的扩展评估显示，与人工方法相比，ReqFusion在需求提取准确率上显著提升，分析时间减少78%。多提供商架构通过模型共识与备用机制增强了系统的可靠性，而基于PEGS的方法则确保了所有需求类别得到全面覆盖。

title: Evaluating LLM-Based Test Generation Under Software Evolution
authors: Sabaat Haroon, Mohammad Taha Khan, Muhammad Ali Gulzar
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for automated unit test generation. However, it remains unclear whether these tests reflect genuine reasoning about program behavior or simply reproduce superficial patterns learned during training. If the latter dominates, LLM-generated tests may exhibit weaknesses such as reduced coverage, missed regressions, and undetected faults. Understanding how LLMs generate tests and how those tests respond to code evolution is therefore essential. We present a large-scale empirical study of LLM-based test generation under program changes. Using an automated mutation-driven framework, we analyze how generated tests react to semantic-altering changes (SAC) and semantic-preserving changes (SPC) across eight LLMs and 22,374 program variants. LLMs achieve strong baseline results, reaching 79% line coverage and 76% branch coverage with fully passing test suites on the original programs. However, performance degrades as programs evolve. Under SACs, the pass rate of newly generated tests drops to 66%, and branch coverage declines to 60%. More than 99% of failing SAC tests pass on the original program while executing the modified region, indicating residual alignment with the original behavior rather than adaptation to updated semantics. Performance also declines under SPCs despite unchanged functionality: pass rates fall to 79% and branch coverage to 69%. Although SPC edits preserve semantics, they often introduce larger syntactic changes, leading to instability in generated test suites. Models generate more new tests while discarding many baseline tests, suggesting sensitivity to lexical changes rather than true semantic impact. Overall, our results indicate that current LLM-based test generation relies heavily on surface-level cues and struggles to maintain regression awareness as programs evolve.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的测试生成在软件演化中的评估
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化单元测试生成中的应用日益广泛。然而，目前尚不明确这些测试是真正基于对程序行为的深入推理，还是仅仅复制了训练过程中学到的表面模式。如果后者占主导地位，LLM生成的测试可能会暴露出诸多缺陷，例如覆盖率降低、回归问题被遗漏以及潜在缺陷未被发现。因此，理解LLM如何生成测试，以及这些测试如何响应代码演进，显得至关重要。本文提出了一项大规模实证研究，探讨LLM驱动的测试生成在程序变更下的表现。我们采用自动化的突变驱动框架，分析了八种不同LLM在22,374个程序变体上对语义改变型变更（SAC）和语义保持型变更（SPC）的反应。实验结果显示，LLM在原始程序上表现出较强的基线性能：生成的测试套件可达到79%的行覆盖率和76%的分支覆盖率，且全部通过。然而，随着程序的演化，性能显著下降。在SAC场景下，新生成测试的通过率降至66%，分支覆盖率下降至60%。超过99%的因SAC而失败的测试在原始程序上执行修改区域时仍能通过，表明这些测试仍残留于原程序的行为模式，未能适应更新后的语义。即使在SPC场景下，功能保持不变，性能同样下降：通过率降至79%，分支覆盖率降至69%。尽管SPC变更不改变程序语义，但往往引入较大的语法变化，导致生成的测试套件变得不稳定。模型倾向于生成更多新测试，同时丢弃大量原有测试，这表明其对词汇层面的变化更为敏感，而非真正理解语义上的影响。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，当前基于LLM的测试生成严重依赖表面线索，在程序演化过程中难以维持有效的回归检测能力。

title: Three Years with Classroom AI in Introductory Programming: Shifts in Student Awareness, Interaction, and Performance
authors: Boxuan Ma, Huiyong Li, Gen Li, Li Chen, Cheng Tang, Atsushi Shimada, Shin'ichi Konomi
abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) tools such as ChatGPT now provide novice programmers with instant, personalized support and are reshaping computing education. While a growing body of work examines AI's immediate impacts, longitudinal evidence remains limited on how students' awareness, student-AI interaction patterns, and course outcomes evolve as AI becomes routine in classrooms. To address this gap, we investigate an introductory Python course across three successive AI-supported cohorts (2023-2025). Using questionnaires, coded student-AI dialogue logs, and course assessment records, we examine cohort-to-cohort shifts in students' AI awareness, interaction practices, and learning outcomes. We find that students' relationships with GenAI change systematically over time: familiarity and uptake become increasingly normative, and help-seeking practices evolve alongside growing AI literacy and shifting expectations of what the assistant should provide. These changes suggest that, in the AI era, the central instructional challenge is less about whether students use AI and more about how courses redefine productive learning practices while maintaining student agency. Our study offers longitudinal evidence and practical implications for designing and integrating AI programming support in course settings.
title_zh: 三年使用课堂人工智能教授入门编程：学生认知、互动与表现的转变
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）工具，如ChatGPT，如今为初学者程序员提供了即时且个性化的支持，正在重塑计算机科学教育。尽管已有大量研究探讨了AI的即时影响，但关于学生对AI的认知、师生与AI的互动模式，以及课程学习成果如何随AI在课堂中日益常态化而演变的长期证据仍十分有限。为填补这一空白，我们对2023至2025年间连续三个AI辅助教学的入门Python课程班进行了纵向研究。通过问卷调查、编码的学生与AI对话日志，以及课程评估记录，我们分析了不同年级学生在AI认知、互动行为和学习成效方面的变化趋势。研究发现，学生与GenAI的关系随时间系统性地发生转变：对AI的熟悉度和使用率逐渐成为常态，求助行为也随着AI素养的提升和对学生助手期望的变化而不断演进。这些发现表明，在AI时代，教学的核心挑战已不再是如何禁止学生使用AI，而是如何重新定义高效的学习实践，同时保障学生的自主性。本研究提供了宝贵的长期证据，并为课程环境中设计与整合AI编程支持提供了切实可行的启示。

title: Security Integration and Risk Management in Modern DevOps: Tools, Frameworks, and Emerging Trends
authors: Manjula Sanjay Koti, Ankit Kumar, J Rajeshwari, S. Satheesh Kumar, Khalid Anjum, Gautam S Languti
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computational Innovations and Sustainable Technologies (ICCIST)
