abstract: The emergence of DevOps has pushed teams to release updates more quickly than ever before, genuinely revolutionizing the speed of software delivery. Our study delves deeply into this important issue by examining how strong security measures, also known as DevSecOps, can be seamlessly integrated into DevOps procedures. We have combed through the most recent scholarly research to create a comprehensive picture of the frameworks, tools, and approaches that effectively integrate security into each stage of the software development process. Our analysis shows that there is an urgent need for automated security testing, cutting-edge risk models like the Preference Ranking Organization Method for Enrichment Evaluation (PROMETHEE), and cutting-edge solutions like blockchain to produce reliable audit trails. Future developments are probably going to concentrate on deeper governance integration, AIpowered threat intelligence, and the creation of standardized security maturity models for big businesses.
title_zh: 现代DevOps中的安全集成与风险管理：工具、框架及新兴趋势
abstract_zh: DevOps的出现促使团队以前所未有的速度发布更新，真正革新了软件交付的速度。本研究深入探讨了这一重要议题，分析了如何将强有力的安全措施（即DevSecOps）无缝融入DevOps流程中。我们梳理了最新的学术研究成果，全面呈现了能够有效将安全集成到软件开发各个阶段的框架、工具和方法。我们的分析表明，迫切需要自动化安全测试、先进的风险评估模型（如偏好排序组织法—增强评价，PROMETHEE），以及区块链等前沿技术，以建立可靠的审计追踪机制。未来的发展趋势很可能聚焦于更深层次的治理整合、基于人工智能的威胁情报，以及为大型企业制定标准化的安全成熟度模型。

title: An Efficient Methodology to Develop Data Encryption Algorithms for IoT Networks
authors: Swapna Rani Thandra, M Rajendra Prasad, Maznu Shaik, K Rajasekhar, Pavan Kumar Tatavarathi
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computational Innovations and Sustainable Technologies (ICCIST)
abstract: Enhancement of data security in IoT networks by implementing cryptographic algorithms and functions to encrypt data transmitted by IoT systems over Wi-Fi networks is proposed. Since there is not much attention given to data security while using IoT, there are chances of data theft as hackers target the vulnerable devices and valuable data can be stolen. If plain text or strings are transmitted over IoT networks, it is easily identified by hackers. The goal is to address these challenges by implementing data encryption mechanisms for IoT networks and to protect sensitive data from unauthorized access by ensuring that intercepted data cannot be understood by potential attackers. The proposed methodology is to create a comprehensive encryption mechanism for safeguarding data stored in ESP8266 and transmitted over networks. The proposed approach has Caesar’s Cipher, and custom encryption (XOR) methods to ensure maximum data protection. Additionally, the mechanism will include encryption for string data received from a dedicated webpage, simulating real-life scenarios where users utilize a custom webpage to communicate with the ESP micro-controller. The primary purpose of this research is to develop a robust encryption solution that renders data incomprehensible to unauthorized users.
title_zh: 一种高效的方法来开发物联网网络的数据加密算法
abstract_zh: 通过在物联网（IoT）网络中实施加密算法和函数，对通过Wi-Fi网络传输的物联网系统数据进行加密，以增强数据安全性。由于在使用物联网时往往忽视数据安全，黑客容易攻击那些脆弱的设备，导致有价值的数据被窃取。如果明文或字符串在物联网网络中传输，很容易被黑客识别。本研究旨在通过为物联网网络实施数据加密机制，解决上述挑战，确保被截获的数据无法被潜在攻击者理解，从而保护敏感数据免遭未授权访问。所提出的方案是为ESP8266中存储的数据及通过网络传输的数据建立一个全面的加密机制。该方法包括凯撒密码（Caesar’s Cipher）以及自定义加密（XOR）技术，以实现最大程度的数据保护。此外，该机制还将对来自专用网页的字符串数据进行加密，模拟用户通过自定义网页与ESP微控制器通信的真实场景。本研究的主要目标是开发一种强大的加密解决方案，使数据对未经授权的用户变得无法理解。

title: Design and Implementation of a Novel FPGA-based Secure Electronic Voting System using Fingerprint Authentication
authors: Y. Chalapathi Rao, Doti Giribabu, Harini Nallanagula, Bandla Soumya
publish: 2026 International Conference on AI-Driven Smart Systems and Ubiquitous Computing (ICAUC)
abstract: The design and implementation of hardware fingerprint based EVM on Zynq-7000 FPGA is presented. The objective of designing this system is to provide security and transparency in the process of voting with fast and reliable operation. As we know, there are many EVMs in the market, but the authentication is manual or not very stringent. This causes several issues like multiple and illegal voting. To address this problem, we implemented biometric authentication on the FPGA device. The FPGA’s Block RAM saves the fingerprint data as .mem files after conversion into binary bitstreams. This allows for on-chip authentication and the fingerprint data matching occurs inside the hardware. The design is entirely coded in Verilog HDL. The operations of fingerprint matching, storing of votes and displaying of results are carried out by using various modules. After the design synthesis on the practical device only authenticated user can vote. No duplicate entries are allowed thus all the data is saved perfectly. The voter registration procedure was confirmed to have correct response and stable output at the display unit. As a result, the design has proven to function reliably as a tamper resistant voting machine. Moreover, the findings reveal the implementation of FPGAs.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的新型安全电子投票系统的设计与实现——采用指纹认证
abstract_zh: 基于Zynq-7000 FPGA的硬件指纹认证电子投票机（EVM）的设计与实现。本系统的设计目标是通过快速、可靠的运行，为投票过程提供安全性和透明性。众所周知，市场上存在多种电子投票机，但其身份认证方式多为人工操作或不够严格，这导致了诸如重复投票和非法投票等一系列问题。为解决这一问题，我们在FPGA设备上实现了生物特征认证功能。FPGA的块RAM在将指纹数据转换为二进制比特流后，将其以.mem文件形式存储。这使得认证过程可在芯片内部完成，指纹数据匹配也在硬件内部进行。整个设计完全采用Verilog HDL语言编写。通过多个模块协同工作，实现指纹匹配、投票存储及结果显示等功能。在实际设备上完成设计综合后，只有经过认证的用户才能进行投票，杜绝重复录入，确保所有数据完整保存。选民注册流程经验证可产生正确响应，并在显示单元稳定输出。结果表明，该设计作为防篡改投票机能够可靠运行。此外，研究还揭示了FPGA在实际应用中的有效实现。

title: A Network Vulnerability Classification Method Based on CVSS
authors: Yizhou Wang
publish: 2025 IEEE 4th International Conference of Safe Production and Informatization (IICSPI)
abstract: In the field of information security, vulnerability assessment, classification, and management constitute core tasks for cybersecurity. Traditional vulnerability scoring and classification methods rely on manual analysis and expert review. This paper proposes an automated vulnerability assessment methodology based on large natural language processing models, which leverages deep learning techniques to achieve intelligent evaluation of the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS). Compared to traditional expert–driven evaluation approaches, this method efficiently parses massive security text data through natural language processing. Specifically, the research innovatively integrates stemming and lemmatization techniques to significantly enhance the model's semantic comprehension of vulnerability description features. Experimental results demonstrate the model's superior assessment performance in cross–dataset tests, validating the effectiveness of deep learning-based automated vulnerability assessment approaches. Experimental results indicate that this model achieves a maximum F1 Score of 96.2% on vulnerability datasets, best reducing error by 12.94% compared to the traditional classification model.
title_zh: 基于CVSS的网络漏洞分类方法
abstract_zh: 在信息安全领域，漏洞评估、分类与管理构成了网络安全的核心任务。传统的漏洞评分与分类方法依赖于人工分析和专家评审。本文提出了一种基于大型自然语言处理模型的自动化漏洞评估方法，利用深度学习技术实现对通用漏洞评分系统（CVSS）的智能评估。相较于传统的专家驱动型评估方法，该方法能够通过自然语言处理技术高效解析海量安全文本数据。具体而言，本研究创新性地融合了词干提取（stemming）与词形还原（lemmatization）技术，显著提升了模型对漏洞描述特征的语义理解能力。实验结果表明，该模型在跨数据集测试中表现出优越的评估性能，验证了基于深度学习的自动化漏洞评估方法的有效性。实验数据显示，该模型在漏洞数据集上的最大F1得分为96.2%，相比传统分类模型，错误率最低降低了12.94%。

title: Research on Automatic Deployment and Intelligent Testing Framework of Autonomous Controllable Operating System for Power Energy System
authors: Xiang Lu, Yang Su
publish: 2025 Asia Conference on Energy Conversion Systems and Power Electronics (AECSPE)
abstract: In this paper, an automatic deployment and intelligent testing framework is proposed to meet the demand of power energy system for autonomous controllable operating system. As a national key infrastructure, the power industry’s core control system has long relied on foreign operating systems, facing the security risks of supply chain. The traditional manual deployment method is inefficient and easy to introduce human error, and the existing testing methods are insufficient in detecting deep vulnerabilities. Therefore, this paper designs an automatic deployment framework of power autonomous controllable operating system, adopts a three-tier modular architecture, and realizes the dynamic loading of heterogeneous device drivers and the automatic generation of cross-platform deployment templates through eBPF technology, which significantly improves the deployment efficiency. At the same time, an intelligent test framework is built, a digital twin test environment is created, and extreme scenarios are simulated by combining chaotic engineering, so that the test coverage rate is improved to 92%. The reinforcement learning method based on PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization) algorithm is introduced to optimize the priority ranking of test cases and shorten the time for finding critical defects. The experimental results show that the framework is significantly better than the traditional scheme in deployment efficiency, system stability and test coverage, which provides a strong guarantee for the safe and stable operation of power system.
title_zh: 面向电力能源系统的自主可控操作系统自动部署与智能测试框架研究
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种自动部署与智能测试框架，以满足电力能源系统对自主可控操作系统的需求。作为国家关键基础设施，电力行业的核心控制系统长期以来依赖国外操作系统，面临供应链安全风险。传统的手动部署方式效率低下且易引入人为错误，而现有测试方法在发现深层漏洞方面能力不足。因此，本文设计了电力自主可控操作系统的自动部署框架，采用三层模块化架构，通过eBPF技术实现异构设备驱动的动态加载以及跨平台部署模板的自动生成，显著提升了部署效率。同时，构建了智能测试框架，建立了数字孪生测试环境，并结合混沌工程模拟极端场景，使测试覆盖率提升至92%。引入基于PPO（近端策略优化）算法的强化学习方法，优化测试用例的优先级排序，有效缩短了关键缺陷的发现时间。实验结果表明，该框架在部署效率、系统稳定性及测试覆盖率等方面均显著优于传统方案，为电力系统的安全稳定运行提供了有力保障。

title: Edge-Optimized Battery SOH Estimation Using LLM-Based Feature Engineering and TinyELM
authors: Younha Kim, Saebin Shin, Eunjae Cha, Xiaoyong Guo, Wansu Lim
abstract: This paper presents a computationally efficient approach for state-of-health (SOH) estimation. This approach has two novel components: large language model (LLM)-based prompt engineering for feature extraction and a edge-optimized extreme learning machine (TinyELM) for efficient SOH estimation. In our LLM-based feature engineering, we leverage GPT-5 to automatically generate potential health indicators from raw voltage and current data, then select two to four features that exhibit strong correlations with the target SOH. Building upon these features, we develop TinyELM as a streamlined and optimized variant of ELM designed for improved estimation accuracy and portability on resource-constrained edge devices. The performance of TinyELM is compared against several deep learning-based models as well as the conventional ELM model and linear-based models on three edge devices, namely, the STM32, Raspberry Pi 4, and Jetson Nano. Experimental results demonstrate that TinyELM achieves state-of-the-art performance in SOH estimation while delivering up to 28.4× faster inference than the conventional ELM and 3× faster inference than the other linear models. Furthermore, the results highlight the effectiveness of our LLM-based feature engineering, showing approximately 5× lower root mean square error on average compared to traditional and automated feature engineering approaches.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型特征工程与TinyELM的边缘优化电池健康状态估计
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种计算效率高的电池健康状态（SOH）估计方法。该方法包含两个创新组件：基于大语言模型（LLM）的提示工程用于特征提取，以及面向边缘优化的极限学习机（TinyELM）以实现高效的SOH估计。在基于LLM的特征工程中，我们利用GPT-5从原始电压和电流数据中自动生成潜在的健康指标，并筛选出与目标SOH具有强相关性的两到四个特征。在此基础上，我们开发了TinyELM——一种针对资源受限边缘设备优化的轻量化、高效化的ELM改进版本，旨在提升估计精度并增强可移植性。我们将TinyELM的性能与多种基于深度学习的模型、传统的ELM模型以及线性模型在三种边缘设备（STM32、Raspberry Pi 4和Jetson Nano）上进行了对比。实验结果表明，TinyELM在SOH估计方面达到了当前最优水平，其推理速度比传统ELM快达28.4倍，比其他线性模型快3倍。此外，结果还凸显了基于LLM的特征工程的有效性，相较于传统及自动化特征工程方法，平均根均方误差降低了约5倍。

title: LGBM-Based Optimal Solution for Data-Driven Transmitter Circuit Design: Prediction Performance and Efficiency Balance
authors: Xiaoli Pei
publish: 2026 International Conference on Embedded Systems, Mobile Communication and Computing (EMC²)
abstract: As semiconductor processes advance to advanced nodes, traditional experience-driven methods struggle to address the growing complexity of large-scale circuit design, leading to inefficient iterations and limited automation. To solve these issues, this study focuses on transmitter circuits and explores data-driven strategies for design automation, aiming to shift the design paradigm toward intelligence. Based on circuit physical properties and domain knowledge, five novel physics-based features were constructed to capture key circuit characteristics. Eight models covering traditional machine learning (LR, KNN, SVR, Random Forest, Extra Trees, LGBM) and deep learning (RealMLP, MLP_PLR) were trained and evaluated using metrics including R2, MAPE, prediction time, and storage size. Results show that the LGBM model achieves optimal comprehensive performance, balancing accuracy and efficiency. SHAP analysis was employed to quantify feature contributions, providing explicit guidance for circuit optimization. The proposed data-driven framework effectively reduces reliance on manual experience, enhances the automation, efficiency, and accuracy of large-scale circuit design, and offers a replicable technical route for intelligent design in related circuit fields.
title_zh: 基于LGBM的数据驱动发射机电路设计最优解：预测性能与效率的平衡
abstract_zh: 随着半导体工艺向先进制程节点发展，传统的经验驱动设计方法难以应对大规模电路设计日益增长的复杂性，导致迭代效率低下且自动化程度有限。为解决上述问题，本研究聚焦于发射器电路，探索基于数据驱动的设计自动化策略，旨在推动设计范式向智能化转型。基于电路物理特性与领域知识，构建了五种新型物理特征，以有效捕捉关键电路性能指标。采用包括传统机器学习（LR、KNN、SVR、随机森林、极端梯度提升树、LGBM）和深度学习（RealMLP、MLP_PLR）在内的八种模型，通过R²、MAPE、预测时间及存储空间等指标进行训练与评估。结果表明，LGBM模型在准确率与效率之间取得了最佳平衡，展现出综合性能优势。通过SHAP分析量化各特征贡献度，为电路优化提供了明确指导。所提出的基于数据驱动的框架显著降低了对人工经验的依赖，提升了大规模电路设计的自动化水平、效率与精度，并为相关电路领域的智能设计提供了可复用的技术路径。

title: Unlocking the Potential Adoption Process of AI-based Software from Business Ideation into Prototyping: Case Study of V0.App
authors: Arfive Gandhi, Prati Hutari Gani
publish: 2025 International Conference on Information Science and Communications Technologies (ICISCT)
abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) had created new entrepreneurial opportunities, especially AI-based software. Entrepreneurs can develop their business ideation faster in generation process and feedback gathering since using AI-based software, such as v0.app. However, the adoption process of AI-based software was questionable since several ethical issues and quality fulfillment. This research constructs five hypotheses to assess relationships among five suspected factors (product quality, motivation, subjective norm, security, and ability) to the intention to use AI-based software in prototyping context. The five hypotheses were accepted after statistical testing so that those suspected factors (product quality, individual motivation, and individual ability) are indeed contributing factors that influence people’s intention to use v0.app as software for business ideation. In qualitative part, most respondents agreed that UI designers and programmers will be irreplaceable. Also, they are concerned about copyright risks since the $\mathbf{v 0}$.app software may produce prototypes that are similar to each other after several users use similar general prompts Therefore, respondents realized the importance of similarity checking and specifying the used prompt based on users’ specific requirements and business ideation.
title_zh: 从商业构想到原型开发：基于AI的软件潜在采纳过程的解锁——以V0.App为例的案例研究
abstract_zh:
生成式人工智能（AI）创造了新的创业机遇，尤其是基于AI的软件。创业者可以借助如v0.app等基于AI的软件，更快地完成创意构思过程并高效获取反馈，从而加速商业理念的开发。然而，由于存在若干伦理问题和质量保障方面的疑虑，基于AI的软件采纳过程仍存争议。本研究构建了五个假设，旨在评估五个潜在因素（产品品质、动机、主观规范、安全性及能力）与在原型设计情境中使用AI软件意愿之间的关系。经过统计检验，这五个假设均被接受，表明所考察的因素（产品品质、个人动机及个人能力）确实对人们使用v0.app作为商业创意构思工具的意愿具有显著影响。

在定性分析部分，大多数受访者认为UI设计师和程序员仍将不可替代。同时，他们也担忧版权风险：由于v0.app软件在多个用户使用相似通用提示词后，可能生成高度相似的原型，因此存在知识产权纠纷的可能性。基于此，受访者意识到进行原型相似性检测的重要性，并强调应根据用户的特定需求和商业创意目标，明确指定所使用的提示词，以确保创新性和独特性。

title: An Edge-based Multimodal Human-Computer Interaction System for Touchless Control using Gesture and Voice
authors: Bagam Laxmaiah, K. Shilpa, Chidrawar Aishwarya, Elkari Sreeja, Chakali Saikumar, B. Bhavya
publish: 2026 International Conference on AI-Driven Smart Systems and Ubiquitous Computing (ICAUC)
abstract: Traditional human-computer interfaces primarily depend on physical input devices like keyboards and mice, which may cause accessibility, hygiene, and flexibility concerns in the contemporary computing atmosphere. Gesture-and voice-based interaction systems have emerged as solutions to some of these problems, but many of the existing approaches are still dependent on cloud, raise privacy issues, and are plagued by latency that reduces real-time usability. This paper describes FIDO which is an offline and multimedia human-computer interaction system that combines hand gesture recognition via vision with offline processing voice commands so as to provide touchless computer control. The system, based on edge AI capabilities, is entirely based on a local hardware and supports a mode-based assistant with the capability to carry out cursor operations, system commands, and informational mind searching, by integrating a local large language model. Contrary to traditional methods which focus on classification accuracy, the presented system is assessed with frame rate (FPS) as a leading performance metric, indicating real-time responsiveness and user experience. The experiments show consistent and graceful interaction over various frame rates from 10 to 60 FPS on non-high-end hardware, with minimal delay and reliable system performance. This method demonstrates the effectiveness of FPS-based assessment for real-time multimodal interaction systems and validates the capability of offline AI-powered interfaces to provide accessible and secure human-computer interaction.
title_zh: 基于手势与语音的边缘多模态人机交互系统实现无接触控制
abstract_zh: 传统的人机交互界面主要依赖键盘、鼠标等物理输入设备，在当今的计算环境中可能引发可访问性、卫生以及灵活性等方面的问题。基于手势和语音的交互系统作为解决这些问题的一种方案应运而生，但许多现有方法仍依赖云端处理，存在隐私泄露风险，并且受延迟影响，降低了实时可用性。本文介绍了一种名为FIDO的离线多模态人机交互系统，该系统结合视觉手势识别与离线语音指令处理，实现无接触式计算机控制。系统基于边缘人工智能能力，完全运行于本地硬件之上，支持基于模式的智能助手功能，能够通过集成本地大语言模型执行光标操作、系统命令及信息检索等任务。与传统方法侧重分类准确率不同，本系统以帧率（FPS）为主要性能指标，突出其对实时响应性和用户体验的保障。实验结果表明，即使在非高端硬件上，系统在10至60 FPS的多种帧率下均能保持稳定且流畅的交互体验，延迟极小，系统表现可靠。该方法验证了以帧率为评估标准在实时多模态交互系统中的有效性，同时证明了离线AI驱动界面在提供可访问、安全的人机交互方面具备强大潜力。

title: NL2SQL Generation Technology for Multi-Source Heterogeneous Data Based on RLHF and Knowledge Graph
authors: Dong Wang, Yize Le
publish: 2025 5th International Symposium on Artificial Intelligence and Big Data (AIBDF)
abstract: Relying on simple rule matching methods can only mechanically transform simple semantics, resulting in low NL2SQL generation efficiency. This paper studies NL2SQL generation technology for multi-source heterogeneous data based on RLHF and knowledge graph. By extracting key indicator information from the structured tables of the power grid business system and constructing an entity relationship network, and simultaneously performing text preprocessing, information extraction, and semantic understanding on unstructured documents, multi-source heterogeneous data is integrated into a structured knowledge graph, forming the foundation for a semantic engine that supports semantic understanding. The Transformer model architecture is used to generate initial SQL statements. Combined with human expert feedback to train a reward model to evaluate the generation quality, the policy network parameters are optimized through a policy gradient algorithm, so that the generated SQL statements meet the business requirements in terms of semantic consistency, syntactic correctness, and execution accuracy. Based on the constructed database characteristic knowledge base, the initial SQL is parsed into an abstract syntax tree and then matched with the target system adjustment rules. Combined with the semantic engine to maintain the query intent, the reward model is used to select the optimal compatible SQL, ultimately achieving accurate NL2SQL conversion across database systems. Experiments show that the proposed technique maintains an accuracy of over 90% with minimal fluctuations under varying data complexity, and an average semantic matching rate exceeding 96%. Compared to the comparison methods, its response speed consistently leads, effectively improving NL2SQL generation efficiency.
title_zh: 基于强化学习人类反馈与知识图谱的多源异构数据NL2SQL生成技术
abstract_zh: 仅依赖简单的规则匹配方法只能机械地转换简单语义，导致自然语言到SQL（NL2SQL）生成效率低下。本文研究基于强化学习人类反馈（RLHF）与知识图谱的多源异构数据NL2SQL生成技术。通过从电网业务系统的结构化表格中提取关键指标信息，构建实体关系网络；同时对非结构化文档进行文本预处理、信息抽取和语义理解，将多源异构数据整合为结构化的知识图谱，为支持语义理解的语义引擎奠定基础。采用Transformer模型架构生成初始SQL语句，并结合人工专家反馈训练奖励模型以评估生成质量，再通过策略梯度算法优化策略网络参数，使生成的SQL在语义一致性、语法正确性和执行准确性方面均满足业务需求。基于构建的数据库特征知识库，将初始SQL解析为抽象语法树，并与目标系统调整规则进行匹配；结合语义引擎保持查询意图，利用奖励模型选择最优兼容的SQL，最终实现跨数据库系统的精准NL2SQL转换。实验结果表明，所提方法在不同数据复杂度下均能保持超过90%的准确率且波动极小，平均语义匹配率超过96%。相较于对比方法，其响应速度始终领先，显著提升了NL2SQL生成效率。

title: Autonomous Cloud Security Hardening using Generative AI and Reinforcement Learning in Zero Trust Architectures
authors: Nagaraju Goshikonda
publish: 2026 International Conference on AI-Driven Smart Systems and Ubiquitous Computing (ICAUC)
abstract: Cloud environments get much more complex, the traditional security model is no longer equipped to handle such attacks. ZTA or zero trust architecture is often referred to as a security model for the mind, assuming that any and every system cannot be trusted. However, traditional ZTA implementations tend to be rather stable. This study proposes a framework that can develop a self-directed automated cloud security system through Zero Trust Architecture (ZTA), using Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). The system automatically responds to attacks by observing the behavior of the sub-systems. After observing it response, it can update and modify the attack policy in a real time. With GenAI to formulate the policies, and Reinforcement Learning (RL) for decision making through feedback, this system strengthens security posture, improves threat detection and enforces Zero Trust compliance. The system can respond to new threats and vulnerabilities. This makes the cloud infrastructures more resilient. The first assessment revealed that the proposed system is better than existing models in terms of flexibility, efficiency, and protection against cyber threats.
title_zh: 基于生成式人工智能与强化学习的零信任架构中自主云安全加固
abstract_zh: 云环境变得愈发复杂，传统的安全模型已无法应对此类攻击。零信任架构（ZTA）常被称为一种“思维层面”的安全模型，其核心假设是：任何系统都不可信任。然而，传统的ZTA实现方式往往较为僵化。本研究提出了一种框架，能够通过零信任架构（ZTA），结合生成式人工智能（GenAI）与强化学习（RL），构建一个自我驱动的自动化云安全系统。该系统通过观察子系统的运行行为，自动响应攻击；在观察到响应后，能够实时更新和调整攻击策略。借助GenAI制定策略，利用强化学习（RL）根据反馈进行决策，该系统显著增强了安全防护能力，提升了威胁检测效率，并确保了零信任原则的合规性。系统能够有效应对新型威胁与漏洞，使云基础设施更具韧性。首次评估结果表明，所提出的系统在灵活性、效率以及对网络威胁的防护能力方面，均优于现有模型。
